description.public:
由铆接在皮革或锁子甲衬底上的竖直金属条构成，条甲护甲在牺牲部分灵活性的同时，提供了强大的四肢保护。

A layer of vertical metal strips riveted to a backing of leather or mail, splint armor offers strong limb protection while sacrificing some flexibility.

Cadence.name: 节奏 Cadence
Cadence.description:
你经过严格训练，能够以富有节奏的精准度连续进行多次近战攻击。当你使用单手近战武器连续多次打击时，每一次后续攻击都会使你获得可叠加的+1 恩惠。

You are drilled in performing sequences of melee attacks with rhythmic precision. When you Strike multiple times in sequence using a one-handed melee weapon you gain a stacking +1 Boon for each successive attack.

Gesture: Arrow.name: 手势：箭头 Gesture: Arrow
Gesture: Arrow.description:
你将一枚灌注了符文魔法力量的投射物掷向远处的目标。

Arrow手势基于智力进行加成，并以60英尺内的单个生物为目标，对未能抵抗该法术的目标造成8基础伤害。施放该手势需要1只手，基础消耗为3动作和1专注。

You hurl a projectile imbued with the magical power of a Rune at a distant target.

The Arrow gesture scales using Intellect and targets a single creature up to a distance of 60 feet, dealing 8 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 3 Action and 1 Focus.

Spellblade.name: 咒刃 Spellblade
Spellblade.description:
你是一名奥术战士，能够在战斗中依靠武艺与奥术技巧，将打击与法术编织结合。你的武器装备所施展的物理打击，能够部分替代传统施法中的姿势手势。

当你以主手持用一把近战武器时，你使用手势：打击施放的法术可获得该武器的伤害加值。

在你以一把近战武器执行一次打击后，你可以立即施放一个其动作消耗减少 1 的法术。

You are an arcane warrior who can weave together Strike and Spell relying on both martial and arcane techniques in battle. The physical strikes of your weaponry partially substitute for the somatic gestures of traditional spellcraft.

While wielding a Melee weapon as your mainhand weapon, spells you cast using Gesture: Strike benefit from your weapon's damage bonus.

Immediately after performing a Strike with a melee weapon, you may cast a spell with its Action cost reduced by 1.

Strong Grip.name: 强力握持 Strong Grip
Strong Grip.description:
你对自己武器装备的掌握稳固而坚定不移。你可以在持用双手持用武器时，执行需要空闲手的动作。试图缴械你时，检定会获得+2祸骰。
Your grasp of your weaponry is firm and unyielding. You can perform Actions which require a free hand while wielding a two-handed weapon. Attempts to Disarm you are made with +2 Banes.

Gesture: Strike.name: 手势：打击 Gesture: Strike
Gesture: Strike.description:
你以符文的奥术精华强化一次近距离直接攻击，使用你已装备的武器进行一次打击。

该打击手势按力量进行成长，并基于你所用武器造成伤害，但其伤害类型变为所融入符文的类型。此手势不需要任何空闲手，且除你的武器打击消耗外，基础消耗还需额外1 专注。

You empower a direct close-range attack with the arcane essence of a Rune, performing a Strike with your equipped weapon.

The Strike gesture scales using Strength and deal damage based on your used weapon but with the damage type of the incorporated Rune. This gesture does not require any free hand and has a base cost of 1 Focus in addition to the cost of your weapon Strike.

Powerful Physique.name: 强健体魄 Powerful Physique
Powerful Physique.description:
你可以使用具有慢速特性的武器，并穿戴具有笨重特性的护甲，而不会在先攻检定中承受祸骰。
You can wield weapons with the Slow trait and wear Armor with the Bulky trait without suffering Banes to your Initiative rolls.

Counter Riposte.name: 反制还击 Counter Riposte
Counter Riposte.description:
你是将一次被招架的攻击转化为对暴露敌人的迅捷反击的专家。

You are expert in translating a parried attack into a swift counter against your exposed enemy.

counterRiposte.name: 反制还击 Counter Riposte
counterRiposte.description:
当你以招架对抗一次近战攻击进行防御时，你可以作出反应并消耗专注，以较低代价进行一次打击反击，并从暴露状态中受益。

When you defend against a melee attack with a Parry, you may react and expend Focus to retaliate with a reduced-cost Strike which benefits from the Exposed condition.
counterRiposte.condition:
你招架一次袭来的近战打击。
You Parry an incoming melee Strike.

Ruthless Momentum.name: 无情动量 Ruthless Momentum
Ruthless Momentum.description:
你沉醉于自己在战斗中所能造成的杀戮，并在每个敌人倒下时继续向战局施压。

You relish the carnage you can cause in combat and continue to press the fray as each enemy falls.

ruthlessMomentum.name: 无情动量 Ruthless Momentum
ruthlessMomentum.description:
击败一名敌人后，你可以移动，最多达你的步幅，并攻击另一名处于近战范围内的敌人。

After defeating an enemy, you may move up to your Stride and attack another foe within melee range.
ruthlessMomentum.condition:
你用一次近战攻击使一名敌人失能。
You incapacitate an enemy with a melee attack.

Lesser Regeneration.name: 次级再生 Lesser Regeneration
Lesser Regeneration.description:
你惊人的强韧赋予你一种超自然的能力，使你能够迅速从创伤中恢复。在你的回合开始时，若你未处于虚弱状态，你获得 +1 生命值。

Your prodigious hardiness conveys a supernatural capability to recover from wounds quickly. At the start of your turn if you are not Weakened you gain +1 Health.

description.public:
长柄刀是一种长柄武器，其末端装有弯曲、如剑般的刀刃，能够以宽阔的弧形打击横扫敌人。

A polearm with a curved, sword-like blade affixed to the end of a long shaft, the glaive sweeps through foes in broad, arcing strikes.

Athletics Novice.name: 运动新手 Athletics Novice
Athletics Novice.description:
你已接受基础运动训练。你在运动技能中获得新手等级，并且不再被视为该技能未受训。

你知道某个地表是否能够承受你的重量，知道在攀爬时如何寻找手点，以及在游泳时如何分配你的重量以获得浮力。你知道如何进行长跑，以及如何控制自己的节奏以避免力竭。

You have received training in basic athletics. You gain the Novice rank in the Athletics skill and are no longer considered Untrained in that skill.

You know whether a surface can support your weight or not, how to find handholds while climbing, and how to distribute your weight for buoyancy when swimming. You know how to run for distance, and how to pace yourself to avoid exhaustion.

Intimidation Novice.name: 威吓新手 Intimidation Novice
Intimidation Novice.description:
你理解威胁与胁迫如何达成预期结果的基本原理。你在威吓技能中获得新手等级，并且不再被视为该技能的未受训。

你知道如何通过简单的暴力展示或公开威胁来让他人听从你的引导，但你并不擅长隐晦行事。

You understand the fundamentals of how threats and coercion can achieve desired outcomes. You gain the Novice rank in the Intimidation skill and are no longer considered Untrained in that skill.

You know how to use simple displays of violence or overt threats to get others to follow your lead, but you aren't very subtle.

Heavy Weapon Training.name: 重型武器训练 Heavy Weapon Training
Heavy Weapon Training.description:
你知道如何运用重型武器施以沉重打击，在每一次挥击中都倾注全部力量。你对重型和平衡类别中的所有武器均为受训。

You know how to use a heavy weapon to deliver punishing blows, putting your entire strength behind every swing. You are Trained with all weapons in the Heavy and Balanced categories.

heavyStrike.name: 强力打击 Heavy Strike
heavyStrike.description:
你用你的主手武器发动一次强力打击。这次攻击施展起来较为缓慢，但经过强化，能造成额外伤害。

You unleash a powerful Strike with your mainhand weapon. The attack is slower to execute, but is Empowered to deliver additional damage.

Opportunistic Spellcraft.name: 借机施法 Opportunistic Spellcraft
Opportunistic Spellcraft.description:
你的敏捷思维能编织魔法，利用稍纵即逝的机会。你可以使用触碰手势来进行一次脱离攻击，而不是进行一次近战武器攻击。

Your quick thinking can weave magic to exploit brief windows of opportunity. You may make a Disengagement Attack using the Touch Gesture instead of a melee weapon attack.

Awareness Novice.name: 察觉新手 Awareness Novice
Awareness Novice.description:
你已经接受过情境察觉基础训练，能够注意到你的环境中的重要细节。你在察觉技能中获得新手 等级，并且不再被视为该技能未受训。

你知道进入房间时要检查出口，也知道如何寻找隐藏的武器、隐蔽的陷阱以及其他威胁。你知道如何发现自己何时被跟踪，以及如何搜查常见的藏身之处。

You have been trained in the basics of situational awareness, and are able to notice important details about your environment. You gain the Novice rank in the Awareness skill and are no longer considered Untrained in that skill.

You know to check for exits when you enter a room, and how to look for concealed weapons, hidden traps, and other threats. You know how to spot when you are being followed, and how to search for common hiding places.

Athletics Journeyman.name: 运动熟练工 Athletics Journeyman
Athletics Journeyman.description:
你在运动技能中获得熟练工等级，获得+1技能加值。

You gain the Journeyman rank in the Athletics skill, providing a +1 Skill Bonus.

Heavy Weapon Proficiency.name: 重型武器熟练度 Heavy Weapon Proficiency
Heavy Weapon Proficiency.description:
你在军用武器装备的运用方面受过熟练的教育。你获得熟练工训练等级，以及在简易、重型和平衡类别的武器上获得+1技能加值。

You have a fluent education in the use of martial weaponry. You gain the Journeyman training rank and a +1 Skill Bonus with weapons in the Simple, Heavy, and Balanced categories.

Sundering Strike.name: 粉碎打击 Sundering Strike
Sundering Strike.description:
你掌握了一种武技，能够利用敌人防御中最薄弱的点，使其暴露于进一步的伤害之下。

You know a martial technique to exploit the weakest points of an enemy's defenses, exposing them to further harm.

sunderingStrike.name: 粉碎打击 Sundering Strike
sunderingStrike.description:
你用你的主手武器进行一次打击；若成功，则对目标施加暴露状态，持续3轮。此次攻击困难施展，且造成的伤害降低。

You make a Strike with your mainhand weapon which, if successful, applies the Exposed condition to your target for 3 rounds. This attack is Difficult to perform and deals reduced damage.

Pyromancer.name: 炎术师 Pyromancer
Pyromancer.description:
你极其擅长编织火焰符文。使用该符文的法术在造成暴击时会施加 @Condition[burning]。

燃烧效果持续1 轮，并对生命值和士气同时造成等同于你的智力值的火元素伤害。

You are highly skilled in weaving the Rune of Flame. Spells which use this Rune cause @Condition[burning] on Critical Hits.

The Burning effect lasts for 1 Round and deals your Intellect score as Fire damage to both Health and Morale.

Gesture: Blast.name: 手势：爆破 Gesture: Blast
Gesture: Blast.description:
你将一个符文的奥术力量投掷到附近你能看见的一点，引发一场剧烈的能量爆炸。

爆裂手势会随智力成长，并在施法者60英尺内的一点为中心产生一个半径6英尺的爆炸范围。该爆炸会对未能抵抗此法术的目标造成8基础伤害。施放此手势需要2只手，基础消耗为5动作和2专注。

试玩测试说明

该天赋目前位于一个第4阶节点。它最终将只能在更高等级时获得（可能需要6级）。目前为了测试而提前开放。

You hurl the arcane power of a Rune into an intense explosion of energy at a nearby point you can see.

The Blast gesture scales with Intellect and produces a blast with 6 feet radius centered on a point within 60 feet of the spellcaster. The blast deals 8 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture requires 2 Hands to cast and has a base cost of 5 Action and 2 Focus.

Playtest Notes

This talent is currently placed at a Tier 4 node. It will eventually only be attainable at a higher level (probably Level 6 required). It is currently available "early" for testing.

Rune: Lightning.name: 符文：闪电 Rune: Lightning
Rune: Lightning.description:
原始电能的混沌之力。闪电符文掌管电荷的积聚与释放来源。

闪电符文以 智力 进行成长，目标为 反射，造成 电击 伤害 至 生命值。它与秩序的 大地 符文相对。

The chaotic force of raw electrical energy. The Lightning rune governs sources of electrical charge and discharge.

The Lightning rune scales using Intellect, targets Reflex, and deals Electrical damage to Health. It is opposed by the orderly rune of Earth.

energize.name: 充能 Energize
energize.description:
你对闪电符文的命令使你能够引导气元素与电流的流动，操控电荷与空气动力学，从而产生以下效果之一：

  • 为你所触碰的不大于一英尺立方的金属物体注入电磁电荷，使其能够强力附着于其他金属。任意时刻只能以这种方式为一个物体充能；若你对另一个物体施放此法术，则先前物体会失去其磁性效果。

  • 以你当前位置为中心，在六码尺半径内聚集一阵狂风，使其要么作为沿单一受控方向吹袭的阵风，要么作为向各个方向施加向心力的旋风。附近区域中的空中效果会被驱散，且重量小于1的未固定物体会被朝阵风方向抛飞。

  • 在你当前所在位置15英尺内、你能看见的一个地点，制造出如雷霆炸响般的冲击性声音。

充能只能影响你能够以身体直接接触到的生物或物体。你也可以尝试其他与上述类似的用途，其效果由游戏主持人裁定。

Your command of the Rune of Lightning allows you to conduct the flow of both air and electricity, manipulating charge and aerodynamics to produce one of the following effects:

  • Instill an electromagnetic charge into a metallic object that you touch no larger than a one-foot cube, causing it to strongly adhere to other metals. Only one object can be charged in this way at a given time, casting this spell on a different object causes the prior object to lose its magnetic effect.

  • Gather a squall of wind at your current location in a six-foot radius which blows either as a gust in a single controlled direction or as a cyclone with centripetal force in all directions. Airborne effects in the immediate area are dispersed and unsecured objects with weight less than 1 are flung in the direction of the gust.

  • Produce the concussive sound of a thunderclap at a location you can see within 15 feet of your current position.

Energize may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Rune: Flame.name: 符文：火焰 Rune: Flame
Rune: Flame.description:
元素、热能的混沌之力。火焰符文掌管火与热。

火焰符文以智力进行成长，目标为反射，造成火元素伤害至生命值。它与秩序的霜冻符文相对立。

The chaotic force of elemental, thermal energy. The Flame rune governs fire and heat.

The Flame rune scales using Intellect, targets Reflex, and deals Fire damage to Health. It is opposed by the orderly rune of Frost.

enkindle.name: 引燃 Enkindle
enkindle.description:
你对 Flame符文的掌控使你能够以富有创意的方式操纵火焰与热能，产生以下效果之一：

  • 显现出一个一英寸球形的元素火焰爆发，可用于点燃蜡烛、火把或其他可燃材料。

  • 以短暂的热能护盾灌注你的身体，使你在紧随其后的、消耗1 动作或更少的一个动作中，对火焰伤害具有免疫。

  • 控制一小片区域内火焰的移动，使其闪烁、舞动或变换，形成一场光影的动态表演。

引燃只能影响你能够以身体接触到的生物或物体。你也可以尝试其他与上述类似的用途，其效果由游戏主持人决定。

Your command of the Rune of Flame allows you to manipulate fire and thermal energy in creative ways, producing one of the following effects:

  • Manifest a burst of elemental flame in one inch sphere which can ignite a candle, torch, or other flammable materials.

  • Imbue your body with momentary thermal shielding which provides you with immunity to fire damage on an immediately subsequent action that costs 1 Action or less.

  • Control the movement of flames within a small area, causing them to flicker, dance, or shift in an animated performance of light and shadow.

Enkindle may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

description.public:
巨剑比标准长剑更长更重，是一种双手持用的刀刃，专为强力的横扫打击而设计，其长度既带来延伸，也令人心生敬畏。

Longer and heavier than a standard longsword, the greatsword is a two-handed blade meant for powerful sweeping strikes, its length commanding both reach and awe.

ancestry.name: 兽人语 Orcish
ancestry.description:
你的出生被群星与一个自豪而坚韧民族的传统所铭刻。你高大且匀称的身体，以及天生倾向于坚韧强健的体质，起源于一个暴露在严酷北方气候无情磨炼中的民族。你的族人首先以他们的力量与坚毅闻名。

Your birth was marked by the stars and traditions of a proud and enduring people. Your tall and well-toned body and natural propensity for toughness has origins amid a people exposed to the relentless struggle of a harsh northern clime. Your people are known for their strength and resilience above all else.

background.name: 士兵 Soldier
background.description:
你曾是某类军事组织中的一名普通成员。纪律让你得以生存，并强调了向他人展现力量与支配地位的重要性，而多年骑马或行军的经历也教会了你如何应对各种地形。

You were a rank-and-file member of a military organization of some variety. Discipline made you a survivor and emphasized the importance of demonstrating strength and dominance over others, and years on horseback or marching taught you how to handle all manner of terrain.

biography.public:
阿格纳斯是一名挥舞长剑的死灵法师，能将死亡魔法注入其沉重的打击之中。阿格纳斯渴望获得咒刃签名天赋。

Agnath is a sword-wielding necromancer who imbues deathly magic into their heavy blows. Agnath aspires to obtain the Spellblade signature talent.

description.public:
匕首小巧、迅捷且致命，能轻易从肋骨间或护甲的缝隙中刺入；它那阴险的锋刃深受刺客、盗贼，以及那些偏好无声杀戮之人的青睐。

Small, swift, and deadly, the dagger slips between ribs or into gaps in armor with ease, its wicked edge favored by assassins, thieves, and those who prefer a silent kill.

Studded Leather Armor.name: 镶钉皮甲 Studded Leather Armor

description.public:
以皮革为基础，并以小型金属饰钉或铆接金属片加固，这种护甲在机动性与对劈砍伤害的基本防护之间取得了平衡。

A base of leather reinforced with small metal studs or riveted plates, this armor strikes a balance between mobility and modest protection against slashes.

Diversionist.name: 佯攻者 Diversionist
Diversionist.description:
你擅长运用诡计，在战斗中分散对手的注意力或欺骗对手。

You specialize in using subterfuge to distract or trick your opponent during combat.

distract.name: 分散注意力 Distract
distract.description:
你对30英尺内一个能看见或听见你的目标发动一次基于欺瞒的技能攻击，对抗其意志防御。若成功，目标失去1点专注。

You make a Deception based Skill Attack against the Willpower defense of a target within 30 feet which can see or hear you. On a success, the target loses 1 Focus.

Dual Wield.name: 双持 Dual Wield
Dual Wield.description:
你擅长同时使用两把武器战斗。你可以将攻击交织在一起，以比单用一把武器更快的速度进行打击。

You are adept at fighting with two weapons simultaneously. You can weave attacks together to strike more rapidly than possible with a single weapon.

offhandStrike.name: 副手攻击 Offhand Strike
offhandStrike.description:
在你用主手武器进行一次基础打击后，你立刻用副手武器进行一次减耗的后续打击。

Immediately after you perform a basic Strike with your mainhand weapon, you make a reduced-cost fullow-up Strike with your offhand weapon.

Flurry.name: 连击 Flurry
Flurry.description:
一种使用两把武器、以连绵不绝的攻击序列压制单一目标的武技。

A martial technique using two weapons to overwhelm a single target with a relentless sequence of attacks.

flurry.name: 连击 Flurry
flurry.description:
你用每把武器各进行两次打击，但每次打击都属于困难。

You Strike twice with each weapon, but each strike is Difficult.

Bloodletter.name: 放血者 Bloodletter
Bloodletter.description:
你使用造成挥砍或穿刺伤害的武器时，其精准打击会在对生命值造成伤害的暴击时导致流血状态。

流血效果持续 1 轮，并额外对生命值造成等同于你敏捷属性值的伤害。

Your precision with weapons which deal Slashing or Piercing damage can cause the Bleeding condition on Critical Hits which deal damage to Health.

The Bleeding effect lasts for 1 round and deals your Dexterity score as additional damage to Health.

Counter Evade.name: 反制闪避 Counter Evade
Counter Evade.description:
你精通闪避型战斗风格，能够利用敌人攻击落空的时机创造反击的空当。

You are practiced in evasive fighting styles which use an enemy's missed attack to devise an opening to counter-attack.

counterEvade.name: 反制闪避 Counter Evade
counterEvade.description:
当你以闪避来防御一次近战攻击时，你可以消耗专注，用你的主手武器进行一次减耗的打击作为反击。

When you defend against a melee attack with a Dodge, you may expend Focus to retaliate with a reduced-cost Strike using your mainhand weapon.
counterEvade.condition:
你闪避一次来袭的近战打击。
You Dodge an incoming melee Strike.

Strike First.name: 先发制人 Strike First
Strike First.description: 先下手为强，事后再问。对任何先攻值低于你的敌人进行打击或法术攻击时，你获得+1 恩惠。 Shoot first, ask questions later. You gain +1 Boon on any Strike or Spell attack against an enemy whose initiative score is lower than your own.

Preternatural Instinct.name: 超自然直觉 Preternatural Instinct
Preternatural Instinct.description:
你的思维与身体同样敏捷，令人印象深刻。你在所有先攻检定中获得+2恩惠。
Your quickness of mind and body are equally impressive. You gain +2 Boons to all Initiative checks.

Defensive Roll.name: 防御翻滚 Defensive Roll
Defensive Roll.description:
你是一名灵活的散兵，总是在移动中，以便在战斗中始终比敌人领先一步。

You are a nimble skirmisher, always in movement to stay one step ahead of your enemies in combat.

defensiveRoll.name: 防御翻滚 Defensive Roll
defensiveRoll.description:
当你闪避一次近战攻击时，你可以消耗专注，以防御翻滚跃出，向任意方向移动最多等同于你体型的距离。

When you Dodge a melee attack you can expend Focus to leap into a defensive roll, moving up to your Size in any direction.
defensiveRoll.condition:
你闪避一次来袭的近战打击。
You Dodge an incoming melee Strike.

Skirmisher.name: 散兵 Skirmisher
Skirmisher.description:
你很擅长进出战团。当你移出敌人的交战半径时，该敌人对你进行的任何脱离交战打击都会具有 2 个祸骰。

You are adept at entering and exiting the fray. When moving out of the Engagement radius of an enemy, that enemy has 2 Banes to any Disengagement Strike against you.

Backstab.name: 背刺 Backstab
Backstab.description:
你将自己狡黠的本能专注于利用被夹击目标的弱点。你发现一个机会，并以致命的效率打击。

You focus your cunning instincts on exploiting the weak points of a flanked target. You identify an opportunity and strike with deadly efficiency.

backstab.name: 背刺 Backstab
backstab.description:
你用你的主手武器对一个被夹击的目标进行打击，造成致命伤害。

You Strike with your mainhand weapon against a Flanked target, dealing Deadly damage.
backstab.condition:
你正在攻击一个处于夹击状态的目标。
You are attacking a target with the Flanked condition.

Impetus.name: 动因 Impetus
Impetus.description:
你很擅长利用他人思考迟缓的弱点。如果在一轮战斗中你位于先攻顺序的第一位，则你获得+1当前和最大动作。

You are gifted at exploiting the slowness with which others think. If you are first in Initiative order during a round of Combat, you gain +1 current and maximum Action.

Light Weapon Training.name: 轻型武器训练 Light Weapon Training
Light Weapon Training.description:
你知道如何灵活运用轻型武器，以极高的机动性与优雅在战斗中施展。你对所有属于轻型和平衡类别的武器均为受训。

You know how to wield light weapons fluidly with a high degree of maneuverability and grace in combat. You are Trained with all weapons in the Light and Balanced categories.

lunge.name: 突刺 Lunge
lunge.description:
你灵巧地向前突进，以突然而出其不意的迅捷发动一次攻击，使用一把灵巧武器对单一目标进行一次打击，且攻击距离增加+2 feet。

此次攻击为困难，但你不会离开当前位置，且此次攻击不会引发脱离接战。

You dart forward nimbly, making a strike with sudden and unexpected swiftness to perform a Strike with a Finesse weapon against a single target with an increased range of +2 feet.

The attack is Difficult, but you do not move from your current position nor does this attack provoke Disengagement.

Intercept.name: 拦截 Intercept
Intercept.description:
你保护你的盟友，拦截原本可能指向同伴的攻击。
You protect your allies, intercepting blows that might otherwise be directed towards your companions.

intercept.name: 拦截 Intercept
intercept.description:
你拦截进入你交战半径内的敌人的路径，立即进行最多等同于你步幅的移动，插入其间并挡住他们的去路。

如果敌人在其回合中移出你的交战半径，或攻击任何其他生物，你可以对其进行一次脱离交战打击。

You intercept the path of an enemy which enters your Engagement radius, immediatly moving up to your Stride to interpose yourself and block their path.

If the enemy moves out of your Engagement radius or attacks any other creature during their turn, you may make a Disengagement Strike against them.
intercept.condition:
一名敌人移动到你的交战半径内，或穿过你的交战半径。
An enemy moves into or through your Engagement radius.

Stealth Novice.name: 潜行新手 Stealth Novice
Stealth Novice.description:
你已接受过潜行、渗透与诡计基础方面的训练。你在潜行技能上获得新手等级，且在该技能上不再被视为未受训。

你知道如何利用光线与阴影来掩饰自己的踪迹，如何在行走时分配自身重量以便更安静地移动，也学会了一些伪装技巧，好让自己融入人群之中。你能够在他人环绕时显得不惹人怀疑，藏身于昏暗的房间里，并且能够安静无声地移动到足以避开一般人的察觉。

You have received training in the basics of stealth, infiltration, and subterfuge. You gain the Novice rank in the Stealth skill and are no longer considered Untrained in that skill.

You know how to use light and shadow to mask your presence, to distribute your weight when walking in order to move more quietly, and you have learned a few tricks of disguise in order to blend into a crowd. You can appear unsuspicious when surrounded by others, hide in a darkened room, and can move silently enough to avoid detection by the average person.

Deception Novice.name: 欺瞒新手 Deception Novice
Deception Novice.description:
你是个骗子和操纵者，而欺瞒是你长期练习的技能。你获得欺瞒技能的新手等级，并且不再被视为该技能未受训。

你知道如何编造基本的谎言和骗局，也知道那些往往会暴露拙劣骗子的明显迹象。你可以为大多数常见文件伪造一份基本的赝品，但它们经不起任何程度的细查。

You are a liar and manipulator, and deception is a skill you've practiced. You gain the Novice rank in the Deception skill and are no longer considered Untrained in that skill.

You know how to construct basic lies and cons, and the telltale signs that tend to give away poor liars. You can construct a basic forgery for most common documents, but they won't stand up to any measure of close scrutiny.

description.public:
细长、渐尖，专为穿刺而制，细剑是杀手的武器——旨在从肋骨之间或护甲缝隙中滑入，几乎不留下痕迹。

Thin, tapered, and made for piercing, the stiletto is a killer’s weapon — designed to slide between ribs or gaps in armor and leave barely a trace.

这瓶药水含有一种专门的炼金配方，能够迅速闭合创伤并改善身体健康。

This potion contains a specialized alchemical formula to rapidly close wounds and improve bodily health.

healingElixir.name: 治疗灵药 Healing Elixir
healingElixir.description:
立即恢复一定数量的生命值，具体数值取决于该灵药的品质。

  • 粗制 - 立即恢复 6 点生命值。

  • 标准 - 立即恢复 12 点生命值。

  • 精良 - 立即恢复 24 点生命值。

  • 优异 - 立即恢复 48 点生命值。

  • 大师工艺 - 立即恢复 96 点生命值。

Immediately recover an amount of Health dependant on the quality of the elixir.

  • Shoddy - Immediately heals 6 Health.

  • Standard - Immediately heals 12 Health.

  • Fine - Immediately heals 24 Health.

  • Superior - Immediately heals 48 Health.

  • Masterwork - Immediately heals 96 Health.

description.public:
一个细长的小瓶，里面装着略带金色的液体。它闻起来很难闻，但其中含有中和多种毒素所需的炼金试剂。

A slender phial that contains a slightly golden-colored liquid. It smells foul, but contains the alchemical agents necessary to neutralize a wide variety of toxins.

antitoxin.name: 抗毒剂 Antitoxin
antitoxin.description:
服用此@ref[name]能够中和影响目标的任何@Condition[poisoned]状态。更强的毒药需要更强的抗毒剂才能中和。

此@ref[name]可抵消的毒药类别取决于其品质：

  • 粗制 - 每轮造成3点伤害或以下的毒药

  • 标准 - 每轮造成5点伤害或以下的毒药

  • 精制 - 每轮造成7点伤害或以下的毒药

  • 优质 - 每轮造成9点伤害或以下的毒药

  • 大师工艺 - 每轮造成11点伤害或以下的毒药

Consuming this @ref[name] is able to neutralize any @Condition[poisoned] conditions affecting the target. Stronger poisons require a stronger antitoxin to neutralize.

The category of poison negated by this @ref[name] depends on its quality:

  • Shoddy - Poisons dealing 3 damage or less per round

  • Standard - Poisons dealing 5 damage or less per round

  • Fine - Poisons dealing 7 damage or less per round

  • Superior - Poisons dealing 9 damage or less per round

  • Masterwork - Poisons dealing 11 damage or less per round

description.public:
这个小瓶里装着浑浊的液体，明显比水更稠。它散发出一种令人不安的气味，引发一种不对劲的感觉。

This small vial contains murky liquid that is noticeably thicker than water. It emits a disconcerting scent that evokes a sense of wrongness.

poisonIngest.name: 摄入毒药 Ingest Poison
poisonIngest.description:
当这种毒素被摄入或以其他方式进入某个生物的血液时，它最初是无害的，但目标必须针对其坚韧进行一次攻击防御，否则会变为@Condition[poisoned]。

毒素造成的伤害量及其持续时间取决于@ref[name]的品质：

  • 粗劣 - 4轮内受到2点伤害

  • 标准 - 6轮内受到4点伤害

  • 精良 - 8轮内受到6点伤害

  • 优异 - 10轮内受到8点伤害

  • 大师级 - 12轮内受到10点伤害

应在毒药被摄入时使用此动作，而非在其首次被涂抹时使用。

When this toxin is ingested or otherwise enters the bloodstream of a creature, it is initially Harmless, but the target must defend an attack against its Fortitude or become @Condition[poisoned].

The amount of poison damage and its duration is dependent on the quality of the @ref[name]:

  • Shoddy - 2 damage for 4 rounds

  • Standard - 4 damage for 6 rounds

  • Fine - 6 damage for 8 rounds

  • Superior - 8 damage for 10 rounds

  • Masterwork - 10 damage for 12 rounds

This action should be used when the poison is ingested rather than when it is first applied.

poisonApply.name: 施加中毒 Apply Poison
poisonApply.description:
这小瓶中的内容物可以加入食物、饮品，涂抹在刃类武器上，或与某种替代性的传递机制结合使用。

此动作会消耗该毒药的可用使用次数，应在首次施用时使用。

The contents of this vial can be added to food, drink, smeared upon a bladed weapon, or combined with some alternative delivery mechanism.

This action, which consumes the available usage of the poison, should be used when it is first applied.

Medicine Novice.name: 医疗新手 Medicine Novice
Medicine Novice.description:
你接受过解剖学、生理学和医疗方面的基础教育。你在医疗技能中获得新手等级，并且不再被视为该技能的未受训。

你已经学会了治疗常见创伤和疾病的基础知识，并持续记录已知的炼金与草药化合物清单，这些化合物可用于治疗特定疾病。只要花一点时间研究一名受伤、染病或因其他原因生病的个体，你就能进行基础诊断并据此治疗。

You have a basic education in anatomy, physiology, and medicine. You gain the Novice rank in the Medicine skill and are no longer considered Untrained in that skill.

You’ve learned the basics of treating common wounds and illnesses, and keep a running list of known alchemical and herbal compounds that can be used for treating particular illnesses. With a little time studying an injured, diseased, or otherwise ill individual you can perform a basic diagnosis and treat accordingly.

Flash of Steel.name: 钢光一闪 Flash of Steel
Flash of Steel.description:
你是使用投掷武器使目标失衡或露出破绽以便后续打击的专家。

You are an expert in using a thrown weapon to imbalance or expose your target for follow-up strikes.

flashOfSteel.name: 钢光一闪 Flash of Steel
flashOfSteel.description:
你进行一次投掷武器攻击，瞄准敌人防御中的弱点。若攻击命中，目标会陷入暴露，直到其下个回合开始。

You make a Thrown weapon attack, targeting a weak point in your enemy's defences. If the attack hits, the target becomes Exposed until the start of their next Turn.

effects.name: 钢光一闪 Flash of Steel

Anticipate Harm.name: 预判伤害 Anticipate Harm
Anticipate Harm.description:
你敏锐的反应与洞察力使你能够预判迫在眉睫的危险，并作出反应以避开它。
Your keen reflexes and acuity allow you to anticipate imminent danger and react to avoid it.

anticipateHarm.name: 预判伤害 Anticipate Harm
anticipateHarm.description:
在该攻击的效果区域被声明后，你可以立即移动 4 尺。如果这次移动使你脱离该攻击的区域，则你不受影响。

You may immediately move 4 feet after the area-of-effect of the attack is declared. If this movement escapes the area of the attack, you are unaffected.
anticipateHarm.condition:
你成为一次范围效果攻击的目标，而你能看见其来源。
You are targeted by an area-of-effect attack, the source of which you can see.

Assassin.name: 刺客 Assassin
Assassin.description:
你擅长为毫无防备者带去死亡。任何针对未察觉目标的打击或法术攻击都会变为致命。

被你攻击命中的未察觉生物，在战斗中直到其自己的回合前，都无法向其盟友发出警报。

You specialize in bringing death the the unwary. Any Strike or Spell attack against an Unaware target becomes Deadly.

An Unaware creature hit by your attack may not alert its allies until its own turn in Combat.

markForDeath.name: 标记死亡 Mark For Death
markForDeath.description:
你花费 1 分钟研究一个生物。对你的目标进行一次知识检定。若成功，你会得知该目标易受哪些伤害类型影响。在战斗第一轮中，你的最低先攻变为比你已标记目标的先攻高 1。

You spend 1 minute studying a creature. Perform a Knowledge Test about your target. If successful, you learn all damage types against which the target is Vulnerable. Your minimum Initiative during the first round of Combat becomes one greater than the Initiative of your marked target.
markForDeath.condition:
你未被察觉。
You are unobserved.

Interrupting Throw.name: 打断投掷 Interrupting Throw
Interrupting Throw.description:
你保持警觉，并准备使用你已装备的武器来打断敌人的施法。

You are alert and prepared to use your equipped weapon to interrupt enemy spellcraft.

interruptingThrow.name: 打断投掷 Interrupting Throw
interruptingThrow.description:
当一个你能看见的敌人施放一个消耗3 个动作或更多的法术时，你可以进行一个反应，对施法者进行一次投掷武器攻击。若你的攻击造成重击，则该法术被打断，且其魔法失效。

When an enemy that you can see casts a Spell which costs 3 Action or greater, you can make a Reaction to perform a Thrown weapon attack against the caster. If your attack results in a Critical Hit the spell is interrupted and its magic is lost.
interruptingThrow.condition:
一个你看得见的敌人施放了一个需要 3 个动作或更多的法术。
An enemy you can see casts a Spell which costs 3 Action or greater.

Light Weapon Proficiency.name: 轻型武器熟练度 Light Weapon Proficiency
Light Weapon Proficiency.description:
你在军用武器装备的运用方面受过熟练的教育。你获得熟练工训练等级，以及在轻型和平衡类别武器上+1技能加值。

You have a fluent education in the use of martial weaponry. You gain the Journeyman training rank and a +1 Skill Bonus with weapons in the Light and Balanced categories.

Awareness Novice.name: 察觉新手 Awareness Novice
Awareness Novice.description:
你已接受过情境察觉基础训练，能够注意到周围环境中的重要细节。你在察觉技能上获得新手等级，且不再被视为该技能未受训。

你知道进入房间时要检查出口，也知道如何寻找隐藏的武器、隐蔽的陷阱以及其他威胁。你知道如何发现自己何时被跟踪，也知道如何搜查常见的藏身处。

You have been trained in the basics of situational awareness, and are able to notice important details about your environment. You gain the Novice rank in the Awareness skill and are no longer considered Untrained in that skill.

You know to check for exits when you enter a room, and how to look for concealed weapons, hidden traps, and other threats. You know how to spot when you are being followed, and how to search for common hiding places.

ancestry.name: 人类 Human
ancestry.description:
在无数状态与遥远之地之间，你作为一名极具适应力的人类出生了。高或矮，瘦削、强壮，或圆胖，你的外貌可谓千差万别。人类最为人所知的是其在基因上倾向于坚定决心，再加上传统塑造出的顽强求生意志。

Found amid countless conditions and far-flung places, you were born an ever-adaptable human. Tall or short, thin, muscular, or rotund, your physical appearance is nothing if not varied. Humans are most known for a genetic predisposition toward determination, with traditions that drive a stubborn will to survive.

background.name: 街头流浪儿 Urchin
background.description:
很少有人像你那样学会生存。你所受的是一场在不信任中进行的残酷教育。你学会了观察他人，寻找危险或不忠的明显迹象，避开他人的注意，在某片蔓延无际的城市街头翻找残羹冷炙。

Few learn to survive the way you did. Yours was a harsh education in distrust. You learned to watch others for the telltale signs of danger or disloyalty, to avoid the attention of others, scavenging for scraps of food on the streets of some urban sprawl.

biography.public:
颠茄是一名狡黠的游荡者，使用两把匕首战斗，对毫无防备的目标迅速连续发动攻击。颠茄渴望获得下毒者签名天赋。

Belladonna is a cunning rogue who fights with two daggers, dealing a rapid sequence of blows against an unwary target. Belladonna aspires to obtain the Poisoner signature talent.

description.public:
缝制或铆接在皮革或布料衬底上的重叠金属片，鳞甲形似巨龙的鳞皮，能很好地防护劈砍和刺击——不过它既吵闹又不够灵活。

Overlapping metal plates sewn or riveted onto a leather or cloth backing, scale mail resembles the hide of a dragon and protects well against cuts and stabs—though it's noisy and inflexible.

Intimidator.name: 威吓者 Intimidator
Intimidator.description:
你擅长凭借自己骇人的威势来击溃敌人的士气。
You specialize in exerting your intimidating presence to break the morale of your foes.

intimidate.name: 威吓 Intimidate
intimidate.description:
你以肢体动作威吓一个位于你交战范围内的敌人，对你的目标进行一次威吓技能攻击。若成功，其士气承受虚空伤害。

You physically intimidate an enemy that is within your engagement range, performing an Intimidation skill attack against your target. On a success they sustain Void damage to Morale.

Second Wind.name: 二次振作 Second Wind
Second Wind.description:
你的身体强韧，让你能够突破常规极限。
Your physical hardiness allows you to push yourself beyond conventional limits.

secondWind.name: 二次振作 Second Wind
secondWind.description:
你集中精力，恢复等同于你坚韧值的生命值。

You focus your energy and recover your Toughness score in Health.

Gesture: Ward.name: 手势：防护 Gesture: Ward
Gesture: Ward.description:
你将符文中的奥术力量塑造成一道保护屏障，用以护卫自己免受伤害。

Ward手势按坚韧进行缩放，并使你针对该法术所用符文的伤害类型获得+6 抗性。该抗性持续1 轮，且你同一时间只能拥有一个Ward。施放另一个使用Ward手势的法术会替换你先前的Ward。此手势需要1 只手来施放，基础消耗为2 动作和1 专注。

You shape the arcane power of a Rune into a protective barrier used to shield yourself from harm.

The Ward gesture scales using Toughness and provides +6 Resistance against the damage type of the Rune used in the spell. This resistance lasts for 1 Round and you may only have a single Ward at a time. Casting another spell using the Ward gesture replaces your prior Ward. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 2 Action and 1 Focus.

Body Block.name: 躯体格挡 Body Block
Body Block.description:
你迎向一次原本会由你的护甲防御的攻击，转而将其结果改为一次格挡。
You lean into an attack which was otherwise defended with your Armor, converting its result into a Block instead.

bodyBlock.name: 躯体格挡 Body Block
bodyBlock.description:
一次原本由你的护甲防御或造成擦伤的攻击会被转化为格挡，且不造成伤害。

An attack which otherwise is defended by your Armor or produced a Glancing blow is converted to a Block and deals no damage.
bodyBlock.condition:
你以你的护甲或以擦身而过的方式来防御一次近战攻击。
You defend against a melee attack with your Armor or as a Glance.

Counter Strike.name: 反击 Counter Strike
Counter Strike.description:
你受过训练，能够在用盾牌防御与迅速反击之间流畅切换。

You are trained to transition between defending with your shield and a swift counter-attack.

counterStrike.name: 反击 Counter Strike
counterStrike.description:
当你以格挡对抗一次近战攻击进行防御时，你可以消耗专注，使用你的主手武器以降低后的代价进行一次打击反击。

When you defend against a melee attack with a Block you may expend Focus to retaliate with a reduced-cost Strike using your mainhand weapon.
counterStrike.condition:
你格挡了一次来袭的近战打击。
You Block an incoming melee Strike.

Dread Lord.name: 恐惧领主 Dread Lord
Dread Lord.description:
你在战场上散发出可怖的威势，考验着附近目睹你的敌人的士气，并击溃那些意志薄弱者的决心。

You exude a terrible presence on the battlefield which tests the morale of nearby enemies that behold you, breaking the resolve of the weak-willed.

formidablePresence.name: 威严气场 Formidable Presence
formidablePresence.description:
你对 12 尺内的敌人发动一次针对意志防御的威吓技能攻击，对其士气造成虚空伤害，并使防御被你压制的目标陷入恐慌状态，持续 1 轮。

You make an Intimidation skill attack against the Willpower defense of enemies within 12 feet, dealing Void damage to Morale and causing the Frightened condition for 1 Round to those whose defense you overcome.

Rallying Cry.name: 振奋战吼 Rallying Cry
Rallying Cry.description:
你是一名战场领袖，运用你的气场与声音来坚定盟友的决心。
You are a battlefield leader, using your presence and voice to harden the resolve of your allies.

rallyingCry.name: 振奋战吼 Rallying Cry
rallyingCry.description:
你发出一声勇敢的怒吼，激励你12英尺内的盟友在危险面前保持坚定。你对盟友的疯狂阈值进行一次威吓技能检定。若成功，受影响的盟友获得@Condition[resolute]，持续一轮。

You emit a courageous bellow that inspires Allies within 12 feet of you to remain stalwart in the face of danger. You perform an Intimidation skill test against the Madness threshold of your allies. On a success, affected allies become @Condition[resolute] for one Round.

Bulwark.name: 壁垒 Bulwark
Bulwark.description:
你精通使用盾牌来保护自己和他人。

每回合一次，当你已装备盾牌时，你可以以降低后的1动作点消耗使用防御动作。

You have expertise in using a Shield to defend yourself and others.

Once per Turn while you have a Shield equipped, you may use the Defend action at a reduced cost of 1 Action Point.

Testudo.name: 泰斯图多 Testudo
Testudo.description: 你极其擅长运用盾牌来采取防御姿态。持用盾牌时，你在对抗武器攻击时，从戒备状态中获得的收益加倍。 You are highly skilled in using shields to adopt a defensive posture. You gain double the benefit of the Guarded condition against Weapon Attacks while wielding a shield.

Hold Fast.name: 坚守不退 Hold Fast
Hold Fast.description:
你是战斗中汹涌浪涛里一个平静的锚点。当你已装备一面盾牌时，你的交战+1，使你能够同时与更多相邻的敌人交战。

You are a calm anchor in the swirling sea of combat. When you have a Shield equipped, your Engagement increases by +1, allowing you to simultaneously engage more adjacent foes.

Awareness Novice.name: 察觉新手 Awareness Novice
Awareness Novice.description:
你已接受过情境察觉的基础训练，能够注意到环境中的重要细节。你获得察觉技能的新手等级，并且在该技能上不再被视为未受训。

你知道进入房间时要检查出口，也知道如何寻找隐藏的武器、隐蔽的陷阱，以及其他威胁。你知道如何发现自己何时被跟踪，也知道如何搜查常见的藏身之处。

You have been trained in the basics of situational awareness, and are able to notice important details about your environment. You gain the Novice rank in the Awareness skill and are no longer considered Untrained in that skill.

You know to check for exits when you enter a room, and how to look for concealed weapons, hidden traps, and other threats. You know how to spot when you are being followed, and how to search for common hiding places.

Intimidation Novice.name: 威吓新手 Intimidation Novice
Intimidation Novice.description:
你理解威胁与胁迫如何达成预期结果的基本原理。你在威吓技能中获得新手等级，并且不再被视为该技能未受训。

你知道如何用简单的暴力展示或公开威胁来让他人听从你的引导，但你并不十分高明。

You understand the fundamentals of how threats and coercion can achieve desired outcomes. You gain the Novice rank in the Intimidation skill and are no longer considered Untrained in that skill.

You know how to use simple displays of violence or overt threats to get others to follow your lead, but you aren't very subtle.

Unarmed Combat Training.name: 徒手战斗训练 Unarmed Combat Training
Unarmed Combat Training.description:
你熟悉基础武术和徒手战斗。你知道如何运用自身的体力来制服或束缚对手。你在徒手武器类别上的熟练等级为受训。

You are familiar with basic martial arts and hand-to-hand combat. You know how to subdue or restrain opponents using your physical Strength. You are Trained with weapons in the Unarmed category.

grapple.name: 擒抱 Grapple
grapple.description:
你试图以身体方式限制或制服一名对手。对一个相邻目标进行一次运动技能攻击。若成功，你和你的目标都将陷入 @Condition[restrained]，持续 1 轮。

You attempt to physically restrain or subdue an opponent. Perform a Athletics skill attack against an adjacent target. If successful, both you and your target are @Condition[restrained] for 1 Round.

Intercept.name: 拦截 Intercept
Intercept.description:
你保护盟友，拦截那些原本可能会打向同伴的攻击。
You protect your allies, intercepting blows that might otherwise be directed towards your companions.

intercept.name: 拦截 Intercept
intercept.description:
你拦截进入你交战半径内的敌人的路径，立刻移动最多相当于你的步幅，插入其间并阻挡他们的去路。

如果敌人在其回合中移出你的交战半径，或攻击任何其他生物，你可以对其进行一次脱离打击。

You intercept the path of an enemy which enters your Engagement radius, immediatly moving up to your Stride to interpose yourself and block their path.

If the enemy moves out of your Engagement radius or attacks any other creature during their turn, you may make a Disengagement Strike against them.
intercept.condition:
一个敌人移动到你的交战半径内或穿过该半径。
An enemy moves into or through your Engagement radius.

Shield Ward.name: 盾牌防护 Shield Ward
Shield Ward.description:
你已掌握一种专门技巧，能够将实体盾牌融入Ward手势中。当你已装备盾牌时，你可以无视使用 Ward 手势的法术所需的空手要求。

You have mastered a specialized technique to incorporate a physical shield into the Ward gesture. You may ignore the free-hand requirement for spells using the Ward gesture while you have a Shield equipped.

Heavy Weapon Training.name: 重型武器训练 Heavy Weapon Training
Heavy Weapon Training.description:
你知道如何运用重型武器打出沉重的猛击，每一次挥动都倾注你的全部力量。你对重型和平衡类别中的所有武器均为受训。

You know how to use a heavy weapon to deliver punishing blows, putting your entire strength behind every swing. You are Trained with all weapons in the Heavy and Balanced categories.

heavyStrike.name: 强力打击 Heavy Strike
heavyStrike.description:
你用你的主手武器发动一次强力打击。这次攻击施展起来较为缓慢，但经过强化，会造成额外伤害。

You unleash a powerful Strike with your mainhand weapon. The attack is slower to execute, but is Empowered to deliver additional damage.

Athletics Novice.name: 运动新手 Athletics Novice
Athletics Novice.description:
你已接受基础运动训练。你在运动技能中获得新手等级，并且在该技能上不再被视为未受训。

你知道某个地表是否能支撑你的重量，知道在攀爬时如何寻找抓手，以及在游泳时如何分配你的重量以获得浮力。你知道如何进行长跑，以及如何调整节奏以避免力竭。

You have received training in basic athletics. You gain the Novice rank in the Athletics skill and are no longer considered Untrained in that skill.

You know whether a surface can support your weight or not, how to find handholds while climbing, and how to distribute your weight for buoyancy when swimming. You know how to run for distance, and how to pace yourself to avoid exhaustion.

Armored Shell.name: 装甲壳体 Armored Shell
Armored Shell.description:
你精通将护甲与盾牌配合使用，构筑出防御性的外壳。

当你处于戒备状态且已装备重型盾牌时，你的基础护甲防御减半，但你的格挡防御会相应增加同等数值。

You are expert in using your armor in combination with your shield to create a defensive shell.

When you have the Guarded condition and have a Heavy Shield equipped, your base Armor defense is reduced by half but your Block defense increases by a corresponding amount.

Shield Combat Training.name: 盾牌战斗训练 Shield Combat Training
Shield Combat Training.description:
你熟练运用盾牌作战，借此猛击并打乱敌人的平衡。你在盾牌类别的武器上达到受训熟练等级。

You are practiced at fighting with shield, using it to slam into and imbalance your foes. You are Trained with weapons in the Shield category.

shieldBash.name: 盾牌猛击 Shield Bash
shieldBash.description:
在用你的主手武器进行一次基础打击后，你用你的盾牌打击，使目标陷入 @Condition[staggered] 状态，持续一轮。

Following a basic Strike with your mainhand weapon, you Strike with your shield, causing the @Condition[staggered] condition for one Round.

Shield Combat Proficiency.name: 盾牌战斗熟练度 Shield Combat Proficiency
Shield Combat Proficiency.description:
你在战斗中使用盾牌方面受过娴熟的训练。你获得熟练工训练等级，以及在盾牌武器类别上的+1技能加值。

You have a fluent education in the use of shields in combat. You gain the Journeyman training rank and a +1 Skill Bonus with weapons in the Shield category.

description.public:
一根略微弯曲的坚固金属杆，一端带有一个扁平头的钩子。用于施加杠杆力，将一个物体从另一个物体上撬开。

A slightly curved bar of strong metal featuring a hook with a flattened head on one end. Used to apply leverage, prying one object loose of another.

这瓶药剂含有一种专门的炼金配方，能迅速愈合创伤并改善身体健康。

This potion contains a specialized alchemical formula to rapidly close wounds and improve bodily health.

healingElixir.name: 治疗灵药 Healing Elixir
healingElixir.description:
立即恢复相当于该灵药品质对应数值的生命值。

  • 粗劣 - 立即恢复 6 点生命值。

  • 标准 - 立即恢复 12 点生命值。

  • 精良 - 立即恢复 24 点生命值。

  • 优异 - 立即恢复 48 点生命值。

  • 大师工艺 - 立即恢复 96 点生命值。

Immediately recover an amount of Health dependant on the quality of the elixir.

  • Shoddy - Immediately heals 6 Health.

  • Standard - Immediately heals 12 Health.

  • Fine - Immediately heals 24 Health.

  • Superior - Immediately heals 48 Health.

  • Masterwork - Immediately heals 96 Health.

Expanded Toolbelt.name: 扩展工具腰带 Expanded Toolbelt

description.public:
一种扩展工具腰带，可以是效用腰带、斜挎弹带，或是缝在你的装备上的一组口袋。

此物品会根据其品质阶级提供若干额外的工具带栏位：

  • Standard：+1 工具带栏位

  • Fine：+2 工具带栏位

  • Superior：+3 工具带栏位

  • Masterwork：+4 工具带栏位

An expanded toolbelt in the form of a utility belt, a bandolier, or an array of pockets stitched into your equipment.

This item provides a number of additional Toolbelt slots according to its quality tier:

  • Standard: +1 Toolbelt slot

  • Fine: +2 Toolbelt slots

  • Superior: +3 Toolbelt slots

  • Masterwork: +4 Toolbelt slots

Rune: Kinesis.name: 符文：念动力 Rune: Kinesis
Rune: Kinesis.description:
空间与物理移动的混沌之力。念动力符文掌管一切与移动行为及物理性相关的事物。

念动力符文基于Presence进行成长，以Physical防御为目标，并造成Bludgeoning、Piercing或Slashing伤害到生命值。它与秩序的控制符文相对立。

The chaotic force of space and physical movement. The Kinesis rune governs all things related to the act of movement and physicality.

The Kinesis rune scales using Presence, targets Physical defense, and deals Bludgeoning, Piercing, or Slashing damage to Health. It is opposed by the orderly rune of Control.

propel.name: 推进 Propel
propel.description:
你对念动力符文的掌控让你能够对重力施加局部控制，以执行基础的念动力操纵，产生以下效果之一：

  • 将15尺内一个未固定且重量不大于1的物体拉向你，并接住它。由生物已装备或持有的物体绝不会被视为未固定，除非该生物愿意放手。

  • 将一个你手持且重量不大于1的物体弹向一个最远30尺外的目标。该物体会以中等速度笔直且无误地飞向该目标。物体路径上的任何生物都可以作出反应接住它，只要其有一只空闲的手可以这样做。

  • 使一个你所接触、重量小于或等于你Presence的10倍的物体或自愿生物悬浮在半空中，将其位置从原本所在处向任意方向改变最多20尺。只要你不再进行进一步的动作，且未处于@Condition[incapacitated]，你就可以无限期维持这种悬浮。

推进只能影响你能够以身体接触到的生物或物体，除非另有说明。你也可以尝试其他与上述类似的用途，其效果由游戏主持人决定。

Your command of the Rune of Kinesis allows you to exert local control over gravitational forces to perform basic telekinetic manipulations, producing one of the following effects:

  • Pull an unsecured object within 15 feet and with weight no greater than 1 towards you and catch it. An object that is equipped or possessed by a creature is never treated as unsecured unless that creature is willing to release it.

  • Flick an object that you hold with weight no greater than 1 towards a target up to 30 feet away. The object flies unerringly in a straight line towards that target at a moderate speed. Any creature along the object's path can react to catch it as long as they have a free hand with which to do so.

  • Suspend in midair an object or willing creature that you touch with weight less than or equal to 10 times your Presence, altering its position up to 20 feet in any direction from its original location. You can maintain this suspension indefinitely as long as you take no further Action and are not @Condition[incapacitated].

Propel may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch unless otherwise specified. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Runewarden.name: 符文守卫 Runewarden
Runewarden.description:
你对奥术的精通使你在面对元素与灵性伤害时更加坚韧。对于每一种你已知与该伤害类型调谐的奥术符文所对应的元素或灵性伤害类型，你获得等同于你一半感知的抗性加值。

当你使用Ward手势时，你的 Ward 所提供的抗性也会提高你一半的感知。

Your mastery of the arcane makes you more resilient to elemental and spiritual harm. You gain a bonus to Resistance equal to half your Wisdom for each Elemental or Spiritual damage type where you know the Arcane Rune attuned to that damage type.

When you use the Ward gesture, the Resistance provided by your Ward also increases by half your Wisdom.

description.public:
鸢形盾因其铁制外形类似熨斗底部而得名，在防护范围与机动性之间提供了良好的平衡。

Named for its iron shape resembling the base of a clothes iron, the heater shield offers a balance of coverage and mobility.

战锤专为击溃板甲与粉碎盾牌而打造，配有一个安装在加固长柄顶端的沉重钝头，在那些崇尚力量胜于灵巧之人的手中带来毁灭。

Built to crush plate and shatter shields, the war hammer features a heavy, blunt head mounted atop a reinforced haft, delivering ruin in the hands of those who favor power over finesse.

Shield Bash.name: 盾牌猛击 Shield Bash
Shield Bash.description:
你擅长持盾作战，能用它猛击敌人并使其失衡。

You are practiced at fighting with shield, using it to slam into and imbalance your foes.

shieldBash.name: 盾牌猛击 Shield Bash
shieldBash.description:
在用你的主手武器进行一次基础打击后，你会用你的盾牌打击，并造成持续一轮的踉跄状态。

Following a basic Strike with your mainhand weapon, you Strike with your shield, causing the Staggered condition for one Round.

ancestry.name: 矮人 Dwarven
ancestry.description:
如同你的父母在你之前一样，你生来便拥有矮人持久的坚韧。你结实的身材与魁梧的外表，是一个生于大地与岩石之民的鲜明特征。坚实的肉体韧性传承由你继承，因为在你的胸膛中，跳动着一颗石之心。

Like your parents before you, you were born with the enduring fortitude of the Dwarves. Your stout stature and burly physical appearance are the hallmarks of a people born of earth and stone. A legacy of physical resilience is yours to inherit, for in your breast beats a heart of stone.

background.name: 警员 Constable
background.description:
你曾是执法机构的一员。你学会了如何对周围环境保持警觉，在复杂的社交结构中开展工作，并展现出令人敬畏的气场。

You were part of a law enforcement organization. You learned how to remain vigilant to your surroundings, work within complex social structures, and affect an imposing presence.

biography.public:
Duurath 是一名强壮的矮人防御者，使用锤子和盾牌来保护盟友，并通过削弱敌人的士气来惩戒他们。Duurath 渴望获得 符文守卫签名天赋。

Duurath is a stout dwarven defender who uses a hammer and shield to protect his allies and punish enemies by sapping their morale. Duurath aspires to obtain the Runewarden signature talent.

description.public:
长弓是一种高大的单体弓，往往比拉弓的弓箭手还要高；它需要极大的力量和多年的练习才能掌握，能以致命的力量将箭矢射过战场。

A tall, self-bow often taller than the archer who draws it, the longbow requires great strength and years of practice to master, sending arrows with deadly force across the battlefield.

凭借其宽阔弯曲的刀身和致命的弧线，弯刀在战斗中翩然起舞，刀锋以优雅而大开大合的打击划过敌人。

With its wide, curved blade and deadly arc, the scimitar dances through battle, its edge carving through foes in sweeping, elegant strikes.

Studded Leather Armor.name: 镶钉皮甲 Studded Leather Armor

description.public:
以皮革为底、加固有小型金属饰钉或铆接金属片的护甲，这种护甲在机动性与对砍击的适度防护之间取得了平衡。

A base of leather reinforced with small metal studs or riveted plates, this armor strikes a balance between mobility and modest protection against slashes.

Pinning Shot.name: 钉射 Pinning Shot
Pinning Shot.description:
你射出一发战术性布置的射击，将目标钉在附近的地表上。
You fire a tactically placed shot to pin your target against a nearby surface.

pinningShot.name: 钉射 Pinning Shot
pinningShot.description:
你从远处打击。然而，此次攻击是困难的；如果你的目标被它命中，则其会变为受拘束，直到其下个回合结束。

You Strike from distance. The attack is Difficult, however if your target is it it becomes Restrained until the end of their next Turn.

Arcane Archer.name: 奥术弓手 Arcane Archer
Arcane Archer.description:
你的箭术技巧能够塑造你的施法，部分替代传统施法中的姿势手势。

当你将投射武器作为主手武器使用时，你在施放带有Arrow手势的法术时无视空手要求，且这些法术的射程变为你的武器射程。

在使用投射武器进行一次打击后，你可以立即施放一个其动作消耗减少 1 的法术。

Your skill with archery can shape your spellcraft, partially substituting for the somatic gestures of traditional spellcasting.

While using a Projectile weapon as your mainhand weapon, you ignore the free-hand requirement for casting spells using the Arrow gesture and the range of those spells becomes your weapon range.

Immediately after performing a Strike with a projectile weapon, you may cast a spell with its Action cost reduced by 1.

Weak Points.name: 弱点 Weak Points
Weak Points.description: 你能识别出攻击敌人弱点的可乘之机。当你使用灵巧武器装备攻击处于未察觉、夹击或暴露状态的目标时，你的任何打击获得 +2 伤害。 You identify moments of opportunity to strike at an enemy's weak points. When attacking a target that is Unaware, Flanked, or Exposed using Finesse weaponry, you gain +2 damage to any Strike.

Mark Prey.name: 标记猎物 Mark Prey
Mark Prey.description:
你射出一发特殊弹药，不造成伤害，但会爆炸成发光粉末，清晰地标记你的目标。

You fire a special shot which deals no damage, but explodes in luminous powder clearly marking your target.

markPrey.name: 标记猎物 Mark Prey
markPrey.description:
你使用一次特殊射击进行打击。如果你的攻击成功，目标在接下来的 3 回合中处于暴露状态。

You Strike using a special shot. If your attack is successful the target is Exposed for the next 3 Turns.

Evasive Shot.name: 闪避射击 Evasive Shot
Evasive Shot.description:
你是精于使用远程武器装备射击并同时闪避敌人攻击的专家。进行一次远程武器攻击后，你获得额外的免费移动，其距离等于你步幅的一半。

You are an expert at firing shots with ranged weaponry while evading enemy attacks. After performing a ranged weapon attack, you gain half your Stride in additional free movement.

Gesture: Arrow.name: 手势：箭头 Gesture: Arrow
Gesture: Arrow.description:
你向远处的目标掷出一枚灌注了符文魔力的投射物。

Arrow手势基于Intellect进行成长，并以60英尺内的单个生物为目标；未能抵抗该法术的目标会受到8基础伤害。施放此手势需要1只手，基础消耗为3动作和1专注。

You hurl a projectile imbued with the magical power of a Rune at a distant target.

The Arrow gesture scales using Intellect and targets a single creature up to a distance of 60 feet, dealing 8 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 3 Action and 1 Focus.

Precision Shot.name: 精准射击 Precision Shot
Precision Shot.description:
你花时间稳住瞄准，锁定敌人最薄弱的部位。你或许只有一次出手机会，但你会让这一击发挥作用。
You take time to steady your aim and target the weakest point of a foe. You may only get one shot, but you make it count.

precisionShot.name: 精准射击 Precision Shot
precisionShot.description:
你稳住瞄准，射出精准的一击。

You steady your aim and fire a single accurate shot.

Stealth Novice.name: 潜行新手 Stealth Novice
Stealth Novice.description:
你已接受过潜行、渗透与诡计基础方面的训练。你获得潜行技能的新手等级，且在该技能上不再视为未受训。

你知道如何利用光线与阴影来掩饰自己的存在，如何在行走时分配重量以便更安静地移动，还学会了一些伪装技巧，以便混入人群之中。你可以在他人环绕时显得不惹人生疑，藏身于昏暗的房间中，并且能够安静无声地移动到足以避开一般人的察觉。

You have received training in the basics of stealth, infiltration, and subterfuge. You gain the Novice rank in the Stealth skill and are no longer considered Untrained in that skill.

You know how to use light and shadow to mask your presence, to distribute your weight when walking in order to move more quietly, and you have learned a few tricks of disguise in order to blend into a crowd. You can appear unsuspicious when surrounded by others, hide in a darkened room, and can move silently enough to avoid detection by the average person.

Fan of Arrows.name: 箭雨扇射 Fan of Arrows
Fan of Arrows.description:
这项困难的远程武器装备技巧使你能够用你的武器在一扫而过的锥形范围内发射多发射击，每次都以效果区域内的不同敌人为目标。
This difficult ranged weaponry technique allows you to fire a multiple shots with your weapon in a sweeping cone, each targeting a different enemy in the area of effect.

fanOfArrows.name: 箭雨扇射 Fan of Arrows
fanOfArrows.description:
你以弧线从远程武器中射出多个投射，打击 40 尺锥形范围内的所有敌方目标。

You fire multiple projectiles from your ranged weapon in an arc, striking all enemy targets within a 40 foot cone.

Twinned Shot.name: 双生射击 Twinned Shot
Twinned Shot.description:
你准备两发子弹，同时向单一目标射击。

You prepare two shots to fire simultaneously at a single target.

twinnedShot.name: 双生射击 Twinned Shot
twinnedShot.description:
使用这项困难技巧时，你会同时发射两枚投射，对同一目标进行两次打击攻击。

Using this Difficult technique, you fire two projectiles at once making two Strike attacks against the same target.

Projectile Weapon Proficiency.name: 投射武器熟练度 Projectile Weapon Proficiency
Projectile Weapon Proficiency.description:
你在投射类武器装备的运用方面受过娴熟的教育。你获得熟练工训练等级，并在投射类别的武器检定上获得+1技能加值。

You have a fluent education in the use of projectile weaponry. You gain the Journeyman training rank and a +1 Skill Bonus with weapons in the Projectile category.

Gesture: Step.name: 手势：踏步 Gesture: Step
Gesture: Step.description:
你将符文之力注入一个移动之中，穿越物理与空间的边界。

踏步手势会随敏捷成长，并允许你沿一直线移动最多 20 英尺，其宽度等于你的体型。对该直线上的未能抵抗此法术的目标造成2 基础伤害。施放此手势不需要任何空闲的手，且其基础消耗为3 动作和1 专注。

试玩测试说明

该天赋的移动部分尚未自动化，必须作为此法术的结果手动执行。

You infuse runic power into a movement, crossing physical and spatial boundaries.

The Step gesture scales with Dexterity and allows you to move up to 20 feet in a straight line with width equal to your Size. It deals 2 Base Damage to targets along that line which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture does not require any free hands to cast and has a base cost of 3 Action and 1 Focus.

Playtest Notes

The movement aspect of this talent is not yet automated and must be manually performed as a consequence of the spell.

Skirmisher.name: 散兵 Skirmisher
Skirmisher.description:
你很擅长进出混战。当你移出敌人的交战半径时，该敌人对你进行的任何脱离打击都具有 2 个祸骰。

You are adept at entering and exiting the fray. When moving out of the Engagement radius of an enemy, that enemy has 2 Banes to any Disengagement Strike against you.

Diversionist.name: 佯攻者 Diversionist
Diversionist.description:
你擅长运用诡计，在战斗中分散对手的注意力或欺骗对手。

You specialize in using subterfuge to distract or trick your opponent during combat.

distract.name: 分散注意力 Distract
distract.description:
你对30英尺内一个能够看见或听见你的目标发动一次基于欺瞒的技能攻击，对抗其意志防御。成功时，目标失去1专注。

You make a Deception based Skill Attack against the Willpower defense of a target within 30 feet which can see or hear you. On a success, the target loses 1 Focus.

Surgeweaver.name: 激涌编织者 Surgeweaver
Surgeweaver.description:
你极其擅长编织闪电符文。使用此符文的法术在造成暴击时会施加 @Condition[shocked] 状态。

电击效果持续1 轮，对士气造成你智力属性一半数值的闪电伤害，并施加 @Condition[staggered] 状态。

You are highly skilled in weaving the Rune of Lightning. Spells which use this Rune cause the @Condition[shocked] condition on Critical Hits.

The Shocked effect lasts for 1 Round, deals half your Intellect score as Lightning damage to Morale, and applies the @Condition[staggered] condition.

Awareness Novice.name: 察觉新手 Awareness Novice
Awareness Novice.description:
你已经接受过情境察觉基础训练，能够注意到自己所处环境中的重要细节。你在察觉技能上获得新手等级，并且不再被视为该技能的未受训状态。

你知道进入一个房间时要检查出口，也知道如何寻找隐藏的武器、隐蔽的陷阱以及其他威胁。你知道如何发现自己何时被跟踪，也知道如何搜索常见的藏身之处。

You have been trained in the basics of situational awareness, and are able to notice important details about your environment. You gain the Novice rank in the Awareness skill and are no longer considered Untrained in that skill.

You know to check for exits when you enter a room, and how to look for concealed weapons, hidden traps, and other threats. You know how to spot when you are being followed, and how to search for common hiding places.

Rune: Illusion.name: 符文：幻象 Rune: Illusion
Rune: Illusion.description:
诡计与奇想的混沌之力。幻象符文掌管虚假或误导性的魔法显现。

幻象符文以 Intellect 进行成长，针对 意志 防御，并对 士气 造成 Psychic 伤害。它与秩序的 照明 符文相对。

The chaotic force of trickery and whimsy. The illusion rune governs magical manifestations of falsehood or misdirection.

The Illusion rune scales using Intellect, targets Willpower defense, and deals Psychic damage to Morale. It is opposed by the orderly rune of Illumination.

seeming.name: 表象 Seeming
seeming.description:
你对幻象符文的掌控让你能够以各种简单方式捏造察觉，并操纵阴影与光来制造干扰或娱乐，产生以下效果之一：

  • 修改你自身外貌的单一方面。此类改变可能包括调整你的嗓音、改变你眼睛的颜色、获得幻象 horns，或看起来稍微更高或更矮。该改变会持续，直到你休息或施加另一种不同的改变，并且可通过身体检查验证其为幻象。

  • 显现一种逼真的短促声音或单一气味的再现，且该声音或气味必须是你能够清晰回忆的。该幻象从你所在的位置发出，并持续10秒。你可以控制声音的音量或气味的浓烈程度，使其能在最远60英尺或更短距离内被察觉到。

  • 将你的影子与你的形体分离，并专门控制它的移动，使其独立于你自身。只要你不执行任何其他会消耗专注的动作，你就可以维持这一幻象。

表象只能影响你能够以身体接触到的生物或物体。你也可以尝试其他与上述类似的用途，其效果由游戏主持人裁定。

Your command of the Rune of Illusion allows you to fabricate perception in various simple ways and to manipulate shadow and light to create distraction or entertainment, producing one of the following effects:

  • Modify a single aspect of your own physical appearance. Such alterations might include adjusting the sound of your voice, changing the color of your eyes, gaining illusory horns, or appearing slightly taller or shorter. The alteration persists until you Rest or enact a different alteration and can be verified as illusory by physical inspection.

  • Manifest a convincing recreation of a short sound or single scent that you can clearly recall. The illusion originates from your position and lasts for 10 seconds. You can control the volume of the sound or odorousness of the scent to be perceptible up to a range of 60 feet or shorter.

  • Decouple your shadow from your form, specifically controlling its movements separately from your own. You can maintain this illusion as long as you do not perform any other action that consumes Focus.

Seeming may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Subtle Extrication.name: 巧妙脱身 Subtle Extrication
Subtle Extrication.description:
你明白如何在远离对手时不让自己暴露于对方最凶狠的反击之下。任何针对你的脱离攻击在进行时，都不会获得通常适用于此类攻击的2个恩惠。

You understand how to move away from an opponent without exposing yourself to the worst attacks in return. Any Disengagement Attack against you is performed without the 2 Boons that would ordinarily apply to such an attack.

Focused Anticipation.name: 专注预判 Focused Anticipation
Focused Anticipation.description:
预判带来果断行动。当你在一轮战斗中拥有最高的先攻值时，你获得+1 专注。

Anticipation leads to decisive action. When you have the highest Initiative score for a Round of combat, you gain +1 Focus.

description.public:
一个装满红色液体的瓶子在破裂时会爆炸，产生一团小型的爆炸性火焰，并迅速消散。

A flask filled with a reddish liquid explodes when it breaks open, creating a small explosive fire that quickly dissipates.
description.private:
这些炼金瓶子主要用于击碎大块矿石，威力十足。若将足够数量的它们组合在一起，也可用来制造连锁反应，从而引发更大的爆炸。

Primarily used to break apart large pieces of ore, these alchemical flasks pack a concentrated punch. If combined in a large enough quantity, they can also be used to create a chain reaction that results in larger explosions.

blastFlask.name: 爆炸瓶 Blast Flask
blastFlask.description:
你点燃并投掷@ref[name]，对爆炸半径内的所有敌人造成火元素伤害。爆炸的半径取决于炸弹的品质：

  • 粗劣 - 3英尺

  • 标准 - 4英尺

  • 优良 - 6英尺

  • 卓越 - 8英尺

  • 大师级 - 10英尺

You light and throw the @ref[name], dealing Fire damage to all enemies in the radius of the explosion. The radius of the Blast depends on the quality of the bomb:

  • Shoddy - 3 feet

  • Standard - 4 feet

  • Fine - 6 feet

  • Superior - 8 feet

  • Masterwork - 10 feet

Rune: Lightning.name: 符文：闪电 Rune: Lightning
Rune: Lightning.description:
原始电能的混沌之力。闪电符文掌管电荷的积聚与释放之源。

闪电符文以智力进行成长，目标为反射，并对生命值造成电击伤害。它与秩序井然的大地符文相对立。

The chaotic force of raw electrical energy. The Lightning rune governs sources of electrical charge and discharge.

The Lightning rune scales using Intellect, targets Reflex, and deals Electrical damage to Health. It is opposed by the orderly rune of Earth.

energize.name: 充能 Energize
energize.description:
你对闪电符文的掌控使你能够引导气元素与电流的流动，操纵电荷与空气动力，以产生以下效果之一：

  • 为你所触碰的一个不大于一立方英尺的金属物体注入电磁电荷，使其强力吸附于其他金属。在任意时刻，只能有一个物体以这种方式被充能；若你对另一个物体施放此法术，则先前物体会失去其磁性效果。

  • 在你当前位置周围六英尺半径内聚集一阵狂风，使其要么作为一股沿单一受控方向吹拂的阵风，要么作为一股向四面八方施加向心力的旋风。周边区域内的空中效果会被驱散，而重量小于 1 的未固定物体会被朝阵风方向抛飞。

  • 在你当前所在位置 15 英尺内、你能看见的一个地点制造出雷鸣般的震响。

充能只能影响你能够实际触碰到的生物或物体。你也可以尝试其他与上述类似的用途，其效果由游戏主持人裁定。

Your command of the Rune of Lightning allows you to conduct the flow of both air and electricity, manipulating charge and aerodynamics to produce one of the following effects:

  • Instill an electromagnetic charge into a metallic object that you touch no larger than a one-foot cube, causing it to strongly adhere to other metals. Only one object can be charged in this way at a given time, casting this spell on a different object causes the prior object to lose its magnetic effect.

  • Gather a squall of wind at your current location in a six-foot radius which blows either as a gust in a single controlled direction or as a cyclone with centripetal force in all directions. Airborne effects in the immediate area are dispersed and unsecured objects with weight less than 1 are flung in the direction of the gust.

  • Produce the concussive sound of a thunderclap at a location you can see within 15 feet of your current position.

Energize may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Projectile Weapon Training.name: 投射武器训练 Projectile Weapon Training
Projectile Weapon Training.description:
你接受过弓术和其他投射武器装备方面的基础教育。对于投射类别中的武器，你不再被视为未受训。

You have a basic education in archery and other projectile weaponry. You are no longer treated as Untrained with weapons in the Projectile categories.

quickDraw.name: 快速拔取 Quick Draw
quickDraw.description:
你可以在压力下射出一击，不过精确度会降低。你进行一次打击，该次打击为困难，但其动作成本会降低。

You can loose a shot under pressure, although with decreased accuracy. You perform a Strike that is Difficult, but has a reduced Action cost.

Perspicacity.name: 洞察力 Perspicacity
Perspicacity.description:
你对周遭环境的某些方面有更敏锐的洞察。你在任何不依赖视力的察觉技能检定中获得+2恩惠。

You have heightened insight into aspects of your surroundings. You gain +2 Boons to any Awareness skill test which does not rely upon eyesight.

ancestry.name: 精灵语 Elvish
ancestry.description:
你的移动优雅，思维敏捷；你生来便是寿命悠长的精灵。你轻盈灵巧的身形与雕琢般的五官，都是一个将优雅视为生活方式的族群所传承下来的特质。你倾向于迅速思考与精确的移动，这些都是数百年传统演化而来的结果。

Graceful in movement and swift in thought, you were born a long-lived elf. Your slight and nimble frame and sculpted features are the inherited traits of a people for whom elegance is a way of life. Your predisposition toward quick-thinking and precise movement the evolutionary results of hundreds of years of tradition.

background.name: 流浪者 Wanderer
background.description:
你过着漂泊不定的生活。你最享受的，莫过于感受车驾或坐骑在你身下前行，看着异乡的天空在头顶缓缓掠过。你学会了仔细留意周围的环境及其需求，照料你所依赖的生物，并就地取材、随遇而安。

Yours has been an itinerant life. You enjoy nothing more than the feeling of a cart or mount below you, watching some foreign sky slowly pass above you. You learned to pay careful attention to your surroundings and their needs, to tend the creatures on which you rely, and to make do with what you can find.

biography.public:
艾利奥文是一名敏捷的散兵，运用箭术与施法从极远的距离压制并消灭敌人。艾利奥文立志获得奥术弓手签名天赋。

Eliorwen is a nimble skirmisher who uses archery and spellcraft to suppress and eliminates foes from a tremendous distnace. Eliorwen aspires to obtain the Arcane Archer signature talent.

description.public:
环甲的特点是将金属环缝在有衬垫的底衬上，相较于更厚重的链甲提供较少的保护，以换取更高的机动性。

Ring mail features metal rings sewn onto a padded base, offering a compromise of less protection than heavier mail options in exchange for greater mobility.

一个由水晶或玻璃制成的球体——在一位有能力的施法者掌中——会成为其力量的传导媒介。它先在其法珠内聚集伏打能量，然后以电击之力轰击目标。

A sphere of crystal or glass that — in the palm of a capable spellcaster — becomes a conduit for their power. It gathers voltaic energy within its orb before blasting a target with electrifying force.

这本厚重的大部头既可用作知识的储库，也可作为施法的法器。在奥术施法者手中，它能够向目标投射震荡性的力场冲击。

This heavy tome is used as a repository of knowledge as well as an implement for spellcraft. In the hands of an arcane practitioner, it can project concussive blasts of force towards a target.

Gesture: Arrow.name: 手势：箭头 Gesture: Arrow
Gesture: Arrow.description:
你将一枚灌注了符文魔法力量的投射物掷向远处的目标。

Arrow 手势使用智力进行成长，并以 60 英尺内的单个生物为目标；若目标未能抵抗该法术，则会受到8 基础伤害。施放此手势需要1 只手，基础消耗为3 动作和1 专注。

You hurl a projectile imbued with the magical power of a Rune at a distant target.

The Arrow gesture scales using Intellect and targets a single creature up to a distance of 60 feet, dealing 8 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 3 Action and 1 Focus.

Gesture: Create.name: 手势：创造 Gesture: Create
Gesture: Create.description:
你将奥术力量凝聚为有形之物，显现出一个精灵，其出现在10英尺内，并以先攻 1 加入战斗。你的精灵是一个仆从，等级为你自身等级的一半。

创造手势按感知进行缩放，且该精灵会存活6轮。你同时只能拥有一个生效中的精灵，若施放另一个使用创造手势的法术，则会替换你先前的精灵。该手势施放时需要2只手，基础消耗为4动作和1专注。

试玩测试说明

并非所有符文都已定义精灵演员。尚未定义创造物的符文目前会显现一个火焰精灵。

You coalesce arcane power into tangible form, manifesting a Sprite which appears within 10 feet and joins Combat at Initiative 1. Your Sprite is a Minion of half your own Level.

The Create gesture scales with Wisdom and the Sprite survives for 6 Rounds. You may only have one active Sprite, casting another spell using the Create gesture replaces your previous Sprite. This gesture requires 2 Hands to cast and has a base cost of 4 Action and 1 Focus.

Playtest Notes

Not all Runes have a Sprite actor defined yet. Runes that do not yet have a defined Creation will — for now — manifest a Flame Sprite.

Rune: Lightning.name: 符文：闪电 Rune: Lightning
Rune: Lightning.description:
原始电能的混沌之力。闪电符文掌管电荷的积聚与释放之源。

闪电符文使用智力进行成长，目标为反射，造成电击伤害至生命值。它与秩序井然的大地符文相对立。

The chaotic force of raw electrical energy. The Lightning rune governs sources of electrical charge and discharge.

The Lightning rune scales using Intellect, targets Reflex, and deals Electrical damage to Health. It is opposed by the orderly rune of Earth.

energize.name: 充能 Energize
energize.description:
你对闪电符文的掌控使你能够引导气流与电流的流动，通过操控电荷与空气动力学来产生以下效果之一：

  • 为你所触碰的一个不大于一立方英尺的金属物体注入电磁电荷，使其强力吸附于其他金属。任意时刻只能以这种方式为一个物体充能；对不同物体施放此法术会使先前物体失去其磁性效果。

  • 在你当前位置周围半径6英尺内聚集一阵狂风，使其要么作为一股沿单一受控方向吹出的阵风，要么作为一个向各个方向施加向心力的旋风。附近区域中的空中效果会被驱散，而重量小于1的未固定物体会被沿阵风方向抛飞。

  • 在你当前所在位置15英尺内、你能够看见的一个地点制造出如同霹雳炸响般的震荡声音。

充能只能影响你能够实际触碰到的生物或物体。你也可以尝试其他与上述类似的用途，其效果由游戏主持人裁定。

Your command of the Rune of Lightning allows you to conduct the flow of both air and electricity, manipulating charge and aerodynamics to produce one of the following effects:

  • Instill an electromagnetic charge into a metallic object that you touch no larger than a one-foot cube, causing it to strongly adhere to other metals. Only one object can be charged in this way at a given time, casting this spell on a different object causes the prior object to lose its magnetic effect.

  • Gather a squall of wind at your current location in a six-foot radius which blows either as a gust in a single controlled direction or as a cyclone with centripetal force in all directions. Airborne effects in the immediate area are dispersed and unsecured objects with weight less than 1 are flung in the direction of the gust.

  • Produce the concussive sound of a thunderclap at a location you can see within 15 feet of your current position.

Energize may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Rune: Kinesis.name: 符文：念动力 Rune: Kinesis
Rune: Kinesis.description:
空间与物理运动的混沌之力。念动力符文支配着一切与移动行为和物质性相关的事物。

念动力符文依靠Presence进行成长，目标是Physical防御，并对Health造成Bludgeoning、Piercing或Slashing伤害。它与秩序的Control符文相对立。

The chaotic force of space and physical movement. The Kinesis rune governs all things related to the act of movement and physicality.

The Kinesis rune scales using Presence, targets Physical defense, and deals Bludgeoning, Piercing, or Slashing damage to Health. It is opposed by the orderly rune of Control.

propel.name: 推进 Propel
propel.description:
你对念动力符文的掌控使你能够对重力施加局部控制，以进行基础的念动力操控，产生以下效果之一：

  • 将15英尺内一个未固定且重量不大于1的物体拉向你并接住。由生物已装备或持有的物体，除非该生物自愿放手，否则绝不会被视为未固定。

  • 将你手持的一个重量不大于1的物体弹向一个最远30英尺外的目标。该物体会以中等速度沿直线准确无误地飞向该目标。物体飞行路径上的任何生物都可以作出反应将其接住，只要他们有一只空闲的手来这么做。

  • 使你所接触的一个物体或自愿生物悬浮在半空中，其重量小于或等于你Presence的10倍，并将其位置从原本所在处向任意方向改变最多20英尺。只要你不再采取进一步的动作，且未处于@Condition[incapacitated]，你就可以无限期维持这种悬浮。

除非另有说明，Propel只能影响你能够实际触碰到的生物或物体。你也可以尝试其他与上述类似的用途，其效果由游戏主持人裁定。

Your command of the Rune of Kinesis allows you to exert local control over gravitational forces to perform basic telekinetic manipulations, producing one of the following effects:

  • Pull an unsecured object within 15 feet and with weight no greater than 1 towards you and catch it. An object that is equipped or possessed by a creature is never treated as unsecured unless that creature is willing to release it.

  • Flick an object that you hold with weight no greater than 1 towards a target up to 30 feet away. The object flies unerringly in a straight line towards that target at a moderate speed. Any creature along the object's path can react to catch it as long as they have a free hand with which to do so.

  • Suspend in midair an object or willing creature that you touch with weight less than or equal to 10 times your Presence, altering its position up to 20 feet in any direction from its original location. You can maintain this suspension indefinitely as long as you take no further Action and are not @Condition[incapacitated].

Propel may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch unless otherwise specified. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Rune: Frost.name: 符文：霜冻 Rune: Frost
Rune: Frost.description:
水与寒冷的秩序之力。霜冻符文掌管水或其他流体的创造，以及它们在液态与冻结态之间的转化。

霜冻符文以 感知 进行成长，目标为 坚韧，并对 生命值 造成 寒冷伤害。它与混沌的 火焰符文相对立。

The orderly force of water and cold. The Frost rune governs the creation of water or other fluids and their transfer between liquid and frozen states.

The Frost rune scales using Wisdom, targets Fortitude, and deals Cold damage to Health. It is opposed by the chaotic rune of Flame.

condense.name: 凝结 Condense
condense.description:
你对霜冻符文的掌控使你能够操纵液体及其热学性质，产生以下效果之一：

  • 从大气中抽取至多四分之一加仑的淡水，注入一个容器中，或置于你所接触的地表上。所创造的水可能会受到你当前位置相关大气性质的影响。

  • 操纵至多 1 加仑水的温度，使其立即冻结或解冻。这些水不必位于容器中；此技巧可用于覆盖一片地表，或通过再冻结将两个物体连接在一起。以这种方式创造的冰会在环境的周围温度所允许的时间内保持冻结。

  • 聚集附近至多一个六码尺立方体的积雪，将其塑形成一个固化的雕塑、形状或庇护所。

凝结只能影响你能够实际接触到的生物或物体。你也可以尝试与上述类似的其他用途，其效果由游戏主持人裁定。

Your command of the Rune of Frost allows you to manipulate liquids and their thermal properties, producing one of the following effects:

  • Draw up to one quarter gallon of fresh water from the atmosphere into a container or upon a surface you touch. The created water may be affected by relevant atmospheric properties of your current location.

  • Manipulate the temperature of up to 1 gallon of water, causing it to immediately freeze or thaw. The water need not be in a container; this technique can be used to coat a surface or join two objects together via regelation. Ice created in this way remains frozen for as long as the ambient temperature of the environment allows.

  • Gather up to a six-foot cube of nearby snow, forming it into a solidified sculpture, shape, or shelter.

Condense may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Mechanical Weapon Training.name: 机械武器训练 Mechanical Weapon Training
Mechanical Weapon Training.description:
你熟悉十字弓、火器及其他类似武装的设计与使用。你对机械类别的武器拥有受训熟练度。

You are familiar in the design and usage of crossbows, firearms, and other similar armaments. You are Trained with weapons in the Mechanical category.

rapidReload.name: 快速装填 Rapid Reload
rapidReload.description:
你深深集中精神，平复紧张情绪，以惊人的速度快速装填你的机械武器。

You focus deeply and calm your nerves to quickly Reload your mechanical weapon with exceptional haste.

Intuit Weakness.name: 洞悉弱点 Intuit Weakness
Intuit Weakness.description:
你平静心神，研究敌人的生理构造，寻找其防御中的弱点。

进行一次知识检定，使用由游戏主持人选择的适当技能。若成功，你会得知该生物最易受到哪种伤害类型的伤害（如果有的话）。若大成功，你会得知其最易受到的两种伤害类型。

You calm your mind and study the physiology of your foe, seeking a vulnerability in its defenses.

Perform a Knowledge Test using an appropriate Skill chosen by the Gamemaster. On a success, you learn the Damage type that the creature has the greatest vulnerability towards, if any. On a Critical Success you learn the two Damage types which have the largest vulnerability.

intuitWeakness.name: 洞悉弱点 Intuit Weakness
intuitWeakness.description:
你静下心来，研究敌人的生理构造，试图找出其防御中的弱点。

You still your mind and study the physiology of your foe, attempting to identify a vulnerability in its defenses.

Inflection: Compose.name: 屈折：作曲 Inflection: Compose
Inflection: Compose.description:
通过在法术构成过程中投入额外时间来强化法术，并以此换取降低其他资源消耗。Compose屈折使法术的专注消耗降低1，作为交换，其动作消耗提高1。

Enhance a spell by taking extra time in its formation, reducing other resource costs in exchange. The Compose inflection reduces the Focus cost of a spell by 1 while increasing its Action cost by 1 in exchange.

Conjurer.name: 召唤师 Conjurer
Conjurer.description:
你是“咒法学派”和“创造手势”的大师，能够将奥术能量显化为物理形态。你可以同时维持至多 3 个此类造物，而不再仅限于一个。

You are a master of Conjuration and the Gesture of Creation to manifest arcane energy as physical form. You can maintain up to 3 such creations simultaneously rather than only one.

Rimecaller.name: 霜唤者 Rimecaller
Rimecaller.description:
你极其擅长编织霜冻符文。使用该符文的法术在暴击时会造成 @Condition[freezing] 状态。

冰冻效果持续1 轮，对生命值造成你感知属性一半的霜冻伤害，并施加 @Condition[slowed] 状态。

You are highly skilled in weaving the Rune of Frost. Spells which use this Rune cause the @Condition[freezing] condition on Critical Hits.

The Freezing effect lasts for 1 Round, deals half your Wisdom score as Frost damage to Health, and applies the @Condition[slowed] condition.

Recognize Spellcraft.name: 识别施法 Recognize Spellcraft
Recognize Spellcraft.description:
你可以解读他人的奥术咒语，以辨明其施法的本质。当你能看见且听见的 40 英尺内有敌人开始施放法术时，若你也知晓该符文，便可以鉴别其符文。

You can interpret the arcane incantations of others to discern the nature of their spellcraft. When an enemy within 40 feet that you can see and hear begins casting a spell, you can identify its Rune if you also know that Rune.

Counterspell.name: 反制法术 Counterspell
Counterspell.description:
你会立即对正在施放的法术作出反应，并构成一个旨在瓦解并抵消敌方法师施法的符文与手势。

试玩测试说明

这个动作现在可以在试玩测试中使用，但它尚未完全自动化。反制法术可以执行，但游戏主持人需要手动撤销先前已应用的法术，并手动扣除其动作和专注消耗。反制法术整体流程中的这些步骤将在后续更新中实现自动化，因此一旦反制法术被确认，也会同时确认被反制的法术，但其效果会被移除。

You immediately react to a spell being cast and compose a rune and gesture designed to unravel and negate the spellcraft of an enemy mage.

Playtest Notes

This action can now be used in playtesting, but it is not yet fully automated. The Counterspell can be performed, but it is up to the Gamemaster to manually reverse a previously applied spell and to manually deduct its Action and Focus cost. These steps of the overall Counterspell workflow will be automated in a subsequent update such that a confirmed Counterspell will also confirm the spell that was countered, but with its effects removed.

counterspell.name: 反制法术 Counterspell
counterspell.description:
你将奥术能量塑造成一种对抗性的施法，目标为你在30英尺内可见的一名施法者。

指定一个你已知的符文和手势，以尝试反制该法术。若你选择的符文与该法术所使用的某个符文相对立，你的此次尝试获得+2恩惠。若你选择的手势与正在施放的手势完全相同，你的此次尝试也获得+2恩惠。

对你的目标的意志防御进行一次无害的法术攻击。若你的掷骰结果超过其防御，该法术即被反制，其魔法被消除，不产生任何效果。

You form arcane energy into a countervailing spellcraft, targeting a spellcaster you can see within 30 feet.

Designate a Rune and Gesture which you know to attempt to counter the spell. Choosing a Rune which is opposed to one used in the spell grants +2 Boons to your attempt. Selecting the identical Gesture as the one being cast also adds +2 Boons to your attempt.

Perform a harmless Spell Attack against your target's Willpower defense. If your roll exceeds their defense, the spell is countered and its magic is nullified, producing no effects.
counterspell.condition:
另一个你能看见的生物正在施放一个法术。
Another creature which you can see is casting a spell.

Tactician.name: 战术家 Tactician
Tactician.description:
你是一位狡猾的战场战术家，能够组织并指挥你的盟友，以更高的效率行动。

You are a cunning battlefield tactician, able to organize and direct your allies to act with increased effectiveness.

tacticalPlan.name: 战术计划 Tactical Plan
tacticalPlan.description:
用不超过10个词，向一名在先攻顺序中于你之后行动的盟友描述一项行动方案。若该盟友在同一轮稍后执行了你所描述的计划，则其与该计划相关的任何掷骰获得+2恩惠。游戏主持人可裁定该计划是否被遵循。
Using 10 words or fewer, describe a course of action to an ally who acts after you in Initiative order. If that ally carries out your described plan later in the same Round, they gain +2 Boons on any dice rolls associated with that plan. The Gamemaster may arbitrate whether or not the plan was followed.

Wildspeaker.name: 荒野言者 Wildspeaker
Wildspeaker.description:
你天生就擅长与动物交流。通过肢体语言和声音，你能够理解并以荒野的语言进行交流。

You have a preternatural knack for communicating with animals. Through body language and sounds, you are capable of interpreting and communicating in the language of the wilderness.

wildspeak.name: 荒野语 Wildspeak
wildspeak.description:
如果你成功通过一次 [[/skillCheck wilderness 14]] 检定，你可以向一只能够感知到你的野兽提出简单的问题。只要该生物并非怀有敌意，它就会在自身知识的范围内如实作答。

  • 智力值为 0 的野兽无法理解你。

  • 智力值为 1 的野兽只能以“是”或“否”作答。

  • 智力值大于 1 的野兽可以给出简单的多词回答。

If you succeed on a [[/skillCheck wilderness 14]] check, you may pose simple questions to a Beast which can perceive you. As long as the creature is not hostile it will respond accurately within the limits of its own knowledge.

  • Beasts with an Intellect score of zero are incapable of understanding you.

  • Beasts with an Intellect score of 1 can only respond with "yes" or "no" responses.

  • Beasts with an Intellect score greater than 1 can provide simple multi-word responses.

Rune: Illusion.name: 符文：幻象 Rune: Illusion
Rune: Illusion.description:
诡计与奇想的混沌之力。幻象符文掌管虚假或误导性的魔法显现。

幻象符文以Intellect进行成长，目标为意志防御，并对士气造成Psychic伤害。它与秩序井然的照明符文相对立。

The chaotic force of trickery and whimsy. The illusion rune governs magical manifestations of falsehood or misdirection.

The Illusion rune scales using Intellect, targets Willpower defense, and deals Psychic damage to Morale. It is opposed by the orderly rune of Illumination.

seeming.name: 表象 Seeming
seeming.description:
你对幻象符文的掌控使你能够以多种简单方式捏造察觉，并操纵阴影与光来制造干扰或娱乐，产生以下效果之一：

  • 改变你自身外貌的单一方面。这类改变可能包括调整你的声音、改变你眼睛的颜色、获得幻象犄角，或看起来略高或略矮。该改变会持续，直到你休息或施行另一种不同的改变为止，并且可通过身体检查验证其为幻象。

  • 显现一种你能清晰回忆起的、令人信服的短促声音或单一气味的再现。该幻象从你所在的位置发出，并持续10秒。你可以控制声音的音量或气味的浓度，使其能在至多60英尺或更短的范围内被察觉到。

  • 将你的影子与你的形体分离，并专门控制它的移动，使其独立于你自身。只要你不进行任何其他消耗专注的动作，你就可以维持这一幻象。

表象只能影响你能够以身体接触到的生物或物体。你也可以尝试其他与上述类似的用途，其效果由游戏主持人决定。

Your command of the Rune of Illusion allows you to fabricate perception in various simple ways and to manipulate shadow and light to create distraction or entertainment, producing one of the following effects:

  • Modify a single aspect of your own physical appearance. Such alterations might include adjusting the sound of your voice, changing the color of your eyes, gaining illusory horns, or appearing slightly taller or shorter. The alteration persists until you Rest or enact a different alteration and can be verified as illusory by physical inspection.

  • Manifest a convincing recreation of a short sound or single scent that you can clearly recall. The illusion originates from your position and lasts for 10 seconds. You can control the volume of the sound or odorousness of the scent to be perceptible up to a range of 60 feet or shorter.

  • Decouple your shadow from your form, specifically controlling its movements separately from your own. You can maintain this illusion as long as you do not perform any other action that consumes Focus.

Seeming may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Surgeweaver.name: 激涌编织者 Surgeweaver
Surgeweaver.description:
你对编织闪电符文极为娴熟。使用该符文的法术在造成暴击时会施加 @Condition[shocked] 状态。

电击效果会持续1 轮，对士气造成你智力值一半的闪电伤害，并施加 @Condition[staggered] 状态。

You are highly skilled in weaving the Rune of Lightning. Spells which use this Rune cause the @Condition[shocked] condition on Critical Hits.

The Shocked effect lasts for 1 Round, deals half your Intellect score as Lightning damage to Morale, and applies the @Condition[staggered] condition.

Mesmer.name: 迷魅师 Mesmer
Mesmer.description:
你极其擅长编织幻象符文。使用此符文的法术在暴击时会造成 @Condition[confused]。

混乱效果持续1 轮，对士气造成相当于你智力数值一半的灵能伤害，并施加 @Condition[disoriented] 状态。

You are highly skilled in weaving the Rune of Illusion. Spells which use this Rune cause @Condition[confused] on Critical Hits.

The Confused effect lasts for 1 Round, deals half your Intellect score as Psychic damage to Morale, and applies the @Condition[disoriented] condition.
