Talisman Weapon Training.name: 护符武器训练 Talisman Weapon Training
Talisman Weapon Training.description:
你理解如何运用护符、法珠、法器或其他类似器具来引导魔法或强化施法中的奥术用法。你对护符类别中的武器具有受训熟练度。

You understand the arcane usage of talismans, orbs, foci, or other similar implements to channel magic or empower spellcraft. You are Trained with weapons in the Talisman categories.

refocus.name: 重新聚焦 Refocus
refocus.description:
你使用已装备的护符，尝试重新获得一些专注。你对自己的Rallying阈值进行一次无害的打击。

成功时，若使用单手护符则恢复 +1 专注，若使用双手持用护符则恢复 +2 专注。若大成功，恢复的专注量额外增加 +1。

You use your equipped Talisman to attempt to regain some Focus. You perform a Harmless Strike against your own Rallying threshold.

On a success you recover +1 Focus if using a one-handed Talisman and +2 Focus if using a two-handed Talisman. On a critical success the amount of Focus recovered increases by an additional +1.

Unshakeable Poise.name: 不动如山的沉着 Unshakeable Poise
Unshakeable Poise.description:
你在压力情境下展现出非凡的沉着；当周围的人失去镇定时，你依然能保持冷静并占据上风。

You demonstrate exceptional poise in stressful circumstances, your cool head prevailing when others around you lose their composure.

unshakeablePoise.name: 不动如山的沉着 Unshakeable Poise
unshakeablePoise.description:
你消耗英雄气概，立即在专注中恢复你的智慧。你可以在战斗中于自己的回合之外、进行反应之前执行此动作。

You expend Heroism to instantly recover your Wisdom in Focus. You may perform this action outside of your turn in Combat before making a Reaction.

Gesture: Conjure.name: 手势：召唤 Gesture: Conjure
Gesture: Conjure.description:
你将奥术力量凝聚为一种更高等的形态，显现出一个访客，其会出现在30英尺内并以先攻 1加入战斗。你的访客是一个与你自身等级相同的仆从。

召唤手势按感知进行缩放，且该访客会存活12轮。你同时只能拥有一个生效中的访客。使用召唤手势施放另一个法术会替代你先前的访客。该手势需要2只手施放，基础消耗为5动作和2专注。

试玩测试说明

该天赋当前位于一个第4阶节点。它最终将只能在更高等级时获得（可能需要6级）。目前为了测试而“提前”开放。

并非所有符文都已定义访客角色。尚未定义召唤物的符文目前会显现一个火焰访客。

You coalesce arcane power into a superior form, manifesting a Visitor which appears within 30 feet and joins Combat at Initiative 1. Your Visitor is a Minion equal to your own Level.

The Conjure gesture scales with Wisdom and the Visitor survives for 12 Rounds. You may only have one active Visitor. Casting another spell using the Conjure gesture replaces your previous Visitor. This gesture requires 2 Hands to cast and has a base cost of 5 Action and 2 Focus.

Playtest Notes

This talent is currently placed at a Tier 4 node. It will eventually only be attainable at a higher level (probably Level 6 required). It is currently available "early" for testing.

Not all Runes have a Visitor actor defined yet. Runes that do not yet have a defined Conjuration will — for now — manifest a Flame Visitor.

ancestry.name: 侏儒 Gnome
ancestry.description:
你的诞生伴随着热烈欢欣的庆祝。你娇小的身躯与精致的面容，配上近乎超自然的探索天赋。你的族人传统崇尚对生命的热爱，以及敏捷思考与迅速行动的重要性。

Yours was a birth of exuberant celebration. Your diminutive body and delicate features are paired with an almost supernatural propensity for discovery. The traditions of your people embrace a lust for life and the importance of quick-thinking and quick-action.

background.name: 学者 Scholar
background.description:
你总是在图书馆或教室里最感自在。你的学习专注于揭开你周围世界的奥秘，而你几乎已经熟悉所有理论性学科。

You were always most at home in a library or classroom. Your studies focused on unravelling the mysteries of the world around you, and there are few theoretical subjects with which you are not already familiar.

biography.public:
Fizzit 是一位聪明的法术工匠和学者，能从远处施放法术，并试图驾驭元素之力为其所用。Fizzit 渴望获得召唤师签名天赋。

Fizzit is a clever spellcrafter and scholar who slings spells from a distance and seeks to harness elemental forces to work in their service. Fizzit aspires to obtain the Conjurer signature talent.

description.public:
这根法师法杖是一件护符，可用于辅助施法，或向敌人投射寒冰冲击。

This mage staff is a talisman to assist with spellcraft or hurl blasts of frigid ice towards enemies.

缝制或铆接在皮革或布质衬底上的重叠金属片，使鳞甲看起来像巨龙的外皮，并能很好地防护砍击和刺击——不过它声音很大，而且不够灵活。

Overlapping metal plates sewn or riveted onto a leather or cloth backing, scale mail resembles the hide of a dragon and protects well against cuts and stabs—though it's noisy and inflexible.

Gesture: Influence.name: 手势：影响 Gesture: Influence
Gesture: Influence.description:
你将符文的奥术力量强化为一种集中的直接接触，这通常是基础触碰手势的更强力进阶形式。

Influence手势使用Presence进行缩放，并以单个相邻生物为目标。它对未能抵抗该法术的目标造成10 基础伤害。此手势需要1 只手来施放，基础消耗为3 动作和1 专注。

You intensify the arcane power of a Rune into a concentrated direct contact which is generally a more powerful evolution of the basic Touch gesture.

The Influence gesture scales using Presence and targets a single adjacent creature. It deals 10 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 3 Action and 1 Focus.

Gesture: Ray.name: 手势：射线 Gesture: Ray
Gesture: Ray.description:
你将符文中的奥术力量汇聚于一点，并将其以一道光束向外投射。

Ray手势以感知进行缩放，产生一条以施法者为起点、宽1英尺、长30英尺的线，对未能抵抗该法术的目标造成6基础伤害。该手势需要1只手来施放，基础消耗为4动作和1专注。

You funnel the arcane power of a Rune into a point and project it outwards in a beam.

The Ray gesture scales using Wisdom and produces a line that is 1 foot wide and 30 feet long originating from the spellcaster, dealing 6 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. The gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 4 Action and 1 Focus.

Conserve Effort.name: 节省精力 Conserve Effort
Conserve Effort.description:
你会在战斗中节省体力时找到平静与专注。当你在回合结束时仍有未消耗的动作，你获得+1 专注。

You find calmness and focus in conserving your effort in battle. When you end your Turn with un-spent Action you gain +1 Focus.

Healer.name: 治疗者 Healer
Healer.description:
你在操纵生命奥术以治疗伤势方面无人能及。若你尚未习得符文：生命，则你学会它。当你使用生命符文为盟友进行治疗时，你的掷骰获得+2恩惠。

You are unparalleled at manipulating vital arcana to treat injuries. You learn Rune: Life if you do not already know it. When healing allies using the Rune of Life you gain +2 Boons to your roll.

fontOfLife.name: 生命之泉 Font of Life
fontOfLife.description:
你释放出一道赐予生命的魔法灵气。激活时立即生效，并且在接下来的3 轮内，于你的每个回合开始时，20 尺内的每名盟友都会恢复等同于你感知属性值的生命值。

开发中：该动作目前被视为一个范围效果，为初始范围内的目标赋予持续治疗效果。当灵气在 Foundry VTT 第 14 版中由系统自动化后，该动作的机制实现将与描述一致。

You bring forth an aura of life-giving magic. Immediately upon activation and at the start of your turn for 3 Rounds every ally within 20 feet heals for an amount equal to your Wisdom score.

WIP: This action is currently treated as an Area of Effect, granting healing-over-time effects to those within the initial range. When auras are automated by the system in Foundry VTT version 14, the mechanical implementation of this action will match the description.

effects.name: 生命之泉 Font of Life

Mental Fortress.name: 心灵堡垒 Mental Fortress
Mental Fortress.description:
你坚定的意志使你极难被影响。你的意志防御获得 +1，并获得对心灵伤害的 5 点抗性。

Your strong will makes you exceedingly difficult to influence. You gain +1 to your Willpower defense and +5 resistance to Psychic damage.

Inflection: Compose.name: 屈折：作曲 Inflection: Compose
Inflection: Compose.description:
通过在法术成形过程中花费额外时间来强化法术，以此换取降低其他资源消耗。Compose屈折会使法术的专注消耗减少 1，作为交换，其动作消耗增加 1。

Enhance a spell by taking extra time in its formation, reducing other resource costs in exchange. The Compose inflection reduces the Focus cost of a spell by 1 while increasing its Action cost by 1 in exchange.

Dustbinder.name: 缚尘者 Dustbinder
Dustbinder.description:
你极其擅长编织大地符文。使用该符文的法术在造成暴击时会施加@Condition[corroding]状态。

腐蚀效果持续3 轮，并且每轮都会造成等同于你智慧属性值的强酸伤害到生命值。

You are highly skilled in weaving the Rune of Earth. Spells which use this Rune cause the @Condition[corroding] condition on Critical Hits.

The Corroding effect lasts for 3 Rounds and deals your Wisdom score as Acid damage to Health each Round.

Talisman Weapon Training.name: 护符武器训练 Talisman Weapon Training
Talisman Weapon Training.description:
你理解如何使用护符、法珠、法器或其他类似的法器来引导魔法或强化施法。你对护符类别中的武器拥有受训熟练度。

You understand the arcane usage of talismans, orbs, foci, or other similar implements to channel magic or empower spellcraft. You are Trained with weapons in the Talisman categories.

refocus.name: 重新聚焦 Refocus
refocus.description:
你使用已装备的护符，尝试重新获得一些专注。你对自己的Rallying阈值进行一次无害的打击。

若成功，使用单手护符时你恢复 +1 专注，使用双手持用护符时你恢复 +2 专注。若大成功，恢复的专注量额外增加 +1。

You use your equipped Talisman to attempt to regain some Focus. You perform a Harmless Strike against your own Rallying threshold.

On a success you recover +1 Focus if using a one-handed Talisman and +2 Focus if using a two-handed Talisman. On a critical success the amount of Focus recovered increases by an additional +1.

Runewarden.name: 符文守卫 Runewarden
Runewarden.description:
你对奥术的精通使你在面对元素与精神伤害时更加坚韧。对于每一种你已知与该伤害类型调谐的奥术符文所对应的元素或精神伤害类型，你获得等同于你一半感知值的抗性加值。

当你使用防护手势时，你的防护所提供的抗性也会提高你一半的感知值。

Your mastery of the arcane makes you more resilient to elemental and spiritual harm. You gain a bonus to Resistance equal to half your Wisdom for each Elemental or Spiritual damage type where you know the Arcane Rune attuned to that damage type.

When you use the Ward gesture, the Resistance provided by your Ward also increases by half your Wisdom.

Wildspeaker.name: 荒野言者 Wildspeaker
Wildspeaker.description:
你天生就擅长与动物交流。通过肢体语言和声音，你能够理解并用荒野的语言进行交流。

You have a preternatural knack for communicating with animals. Through body language and sounds, you are capable of interpreting and communicating in the language of the wilderness.

wildspeak.name: 荒野语 Wildspeak
wildspeak.description:
如果你成功通过一次 [[/skillCheck wilderness 14]] 检定，你可以向一只能够感知到你的野兽提出简单的问题。只要该生物不怀有敌意，它就会在自身知识所限的范围内如实作答。

  • 智力值为 0 的野兽无法理解你。

  • 智力值为 1 的野兽只能回答“是”或“否”。

  • 智力值大于 1 的野兽可以给出简单的多词回答。

If you succeed on a [[/skillCheck wilderness 14]] check, you may pose simple questions to a Beast which can perceive you. As long as the creature is not hostile it will respond accurately within the limits of its own knowledge.

  • Beasts with an Intellect score of zero are incapable of understanding you.

  • Beasts with an Intellect score of 1 can only respond with "yes" or "no" responses.

  • Beasts with an Intellect score greater than 1 can provide simple multi-word responses.

Healing Elixir Formula.name: 治疗灵药配方 Healing Elixir Formula

description.public:
一种广为人知的基础治疗药水配方。
A commonly known recipe for creating a basic healing potion.
description.private:
你可以使用炼金术士工具，将在野外发现的特定治疗草药制成瓶装灵药。
You can turn particular healing herbs found in the wild into a bottled elixir using Alchemists Tools.

Versatile Translator.name: 多才多艺的翻译者 Versatile Translator
Versatile Translator.description:
你在语言学方面拥有学术背景，或对语言有一种直觉般的天赋。你的能力使你能够破译用多种语言写成的文本的基本含义。

你可以将一种你不懂、但使用一套通用字形或字符书写的语言文本，翻译成一种你所懂的语言。进行这样的翻译时，你需要按每个词一分钟的速度，将文本转写成一种你能够理解的语言。

你的译文较为粗略，且往往缺乏细微之处，但仍包含文本的所有要点。

You have a scholarly background in linguistics or an intuitive knack for languages. Your capabilities enable you to decipher the basic meaning of text written in a variety of languages.

You can translate text of a language you do not know that is written using a common set of glyphs or characters to a language that you do know. Creating such a translation requires spending one minute per word to transcribe the text into a language which you understand.

Your translations are rudimentary and often lack nuance, but they do contain all essential points of the text.

Soothe.name: 抚慰 Soothe
Soothe.description:
你进行了一场抚慰人心的表演，鼓舞你的盟友，恢复士气。
You administer a soothing Performance which rallies your allies, restoring Morale.

soothe.name: 抚慰 Soothe
soothe.description:
你吟诵一段安抚人心的诗句，使所有位于12英尺内且能感知到你的盟友受益。对每名盟友的疯狂阈值进行一次表演检定。成功时，每名盟友的士气都会恢复。

You perform a calming verse, benefiting all allies who can perceive you within 12 feet. Make a Performance Check against the Madness threshold of each ally. On success, each ally's Morale is restored.

Gesture: Pulse.name: 手势：脉冲 Gesture: Pulse
Gesture: Pulse.description:
将符文的奥术力量驱散为一个以你为中心、随你向外扩展的半径范围。

Pulse手势按Presence进行缩放，产生一个10英尺半径的散发区域，对未能抵抗该法术的目标造成8基础伤害。该手势施放需要2只手，基础消耗为5动作和2专注。

试玩测试说明

该天赋目前放置在一个第4阶节点上。它最终将只能在更高等级时获得（可能需要6级）。目前为测试目的而“提前”开放。

Expel the arcane power of a Rune in a radius that travels outward with you at its center.

The Pulse gesture scales using Presence and produces an emanation with 10 foot radius, dealing 8 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. The gesture requires 2 Hands to cast and has a base cost of 5 Action and 2 Focus.

Playtest Notes

This talent is currently placed at a Tier 4 node. It will eventually only be attainable at a higher level (probably Level 6 required). It is currently available "early" for testing.

Inspirator.name: 鼓舞者 Inspirator
Inspirator.description:
你极其擅长编织灵魂符文。使用此符文的法术在造成暴击时会施加 @Condition[inspired] 状态。

鼓舞效果持续1 轮，并额外对士气造成等同于你的Presence数值的Restoration。

You are highly skilled in weaving the Rune of Soul. Spells which use this Rune cause the @Condition[inspired] condition on Critical Hits.

The Inspired effect lasts for 1 Round and deals your Presence score as additional Restoration to Morale.

Mender.name: 修补匠 Mender
Mender.description:
你极其擅长编织生命符文。使用该符文的法术在造成暴击时会施加 @Condition[mending] 状态。

修补效果持续1 轮，并额外对生命值施加等同于你的感知属性值的恢复。

You are highly skilled in weaving the Rune of Life. Spells which use this Rune cause the @Condition[mending] condition on Critical Hits.

The Mending effect lasts for 1 Round and deals your Wisdom score as additional Restoration to Health.

Arcana Novice.name: 奥术新手 Arcana Novice
Arcana Novice.description:
你的教育涵盖了形而上学与魔法理论的基础、符文之间的关系、秩序与混沌的对立本质，以及对灵体存在的粗略引言，其中包括最广为人知的被神化与被妖魔化的崇拜对象。你在奥术技能中获得新手等级，并且不再被视为该技能未受训。

你对魔法基本语法原则的初步理解，足以鉴别一个法术或仪式可能使用的是哪一种低阶符文，以及所用的手势（但无法辨别屈折）。你能够判断一个存在更受混沌还是秩序影响，也能识别常见灵体（无论低阶还是高阶）的迹象。你对宗教习俗也有足够了解，能够在与崇拜某位灵体或神祇的人交流时不至于让自己出丑。

Your education covered the fundamentals of metaphysics and magical theory, the relationship between the runes, the opposing nature of order and chaos, and a cursory introduction to spiritual beings including the most commonly known deified and demonized figures of worship. You gain the Novice rank in the Arcana skill and are no longer considered Untrained in that skill.

Your rudimentary understanding of the principle grammar of magic is sufficient to identify which lesser rune a spell or ritual may be using, as well as the gesture used (if not the inflection). You can identify whether a figure is influenced more by chaos or by order, and can spot the signs of common spirits (both lesser and greater). You know enough about religious customs to communicate with those who worship a particular spirit or deity without embarrassing yourself.

Rune: Soul.name: 符文：灵魂 Rune: Soul
Rune: Soul.description:
一种有序的创造与精神本质之力。灵魂符文支配着灵魂在生命与死亡间的基本流转，并与知性、人格及心理健康等事务相关。

灵魂符文以 Presence 进行成长，能够提供 Restoration 以恢复士气，或造成由 意志 抵抗的 Psychic 伤害。它与混沌的 Oblivion 符文相对立。

An orderly force of creation and spiritual essence. The Soul rune governs the fundamental procession of souls through life and death and relates to matters of sapience, personality, and mental health.

The Soul rune scales using Presence and provides Restoration of Morale or inflicts Psychic damage opposed by Willpower. It is opposed by the chaotic rune of Oblivion.

evoke.name: 引发 Evoke
evoke.description:
你对灵魂符文的掌控使你能够促成基础形式的灵性影响，产生以下效果之一：

  • 使你自己或另一名自愿者重温其过去某一时刻的核心记忆，持续时间最多为一分钟，仿佛那是最近才发生的事。

  • 鉴定影响某人的一种负面灵性状态，例如 @Condition[broken]、@Condition[frightened]、@Condition[confused] 或 @Condition[insane]。

  • 与另一名自愿的生物建立短暂的灵性连接，使其能够辨认一个可以用单个词语表达的想法。

引发的用途只能影响你自己或你能够以身体接触到的另一名生物。你也可以尝试其他与上述类似的用途，其效果由游戏主持人裁定。

Your command of the Rune of Soul allows you to facilitate basic forms of spiritual influence, producing one of the following effects:

  • Enable yourself or another willing person to revisit a core memory of a moment from their past up to one minute in duration as if it happened recently.

  • Identify a negative spiritual condition that is affecting a person such as @Condition[broken], @Condition[frightened], @Condition[confused], or @Condition[insane].

  • Create a momentary spiritual connection with another willing creature that allows them to recognize an idea which can be expressed as a single word.

Uses of Evoke may only affect yourself or another creature which you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Irrepressible Spirit.name: 不屈灵魂 Irrepressible Spirit
Irrepressible Spirit.description:
你的坚韧赋予你不屈灵魂，使你能够抵抗绝望的侵袭。在你的回合开始时，若你未处于破碎状态，则你获得 1 点士气。
Your tenacity gives you an irrepressible spirit which resists the onset of despair. At the start of your turn if you are not Broken you gain 1 Morale.

Eye of the Storm.name: 风暴之眼 Eye of the Storm
Eye of the Storm.description:
在你延迟你的回合后，若你在该轮中让某个敌人先于你行动，则你对此敌人进行的任何打击或法术攻击获得+2恩惠。

TODO: 需要自动化。目前请手动应用恩惠。

After you Delay your Turn, gain +2 Boons on any Strike or Spell attack against an enemy that you allowed to act before you that Round.

TODO: Needs automation. For now apply boons manually.

Rune: Earth.name: 符文：大地 Rune: Earth
Rune: Earth.description:
有序的元素大地之力，负责物质实体。大地符文掌管矿物、金属、土壤以及其他物理化合物。

大地符文以感知进行成长，目标为反射，并对生命值造成强酸伤害。它与混沌的闪电符文相对立。

The orderly force of elemental earth, responsible for physical matter. The Earth rune governs minerals, metals, soils, and other physical compounds.

The Earth rune scales using Wisdom, targets Reflex, and deals Acid damage to Health. It is opposed by the chaotic rune of Lightning.

mould.name: 塑形 Mould
mould.description:
你对大地符文的掌控使你能够以基础方式操纵岩石、矿物与土壤的原始力量，产生以下效果之一：

  • 迅速将最多 1 立方英尺的可用材料塑形成一种简单的几何形状，如长方体、椭球体或多面体。

  • 精确复制一件持握物体的物理形状；该物体尺寸必须小于一个 6 英寸立方体，并以可用的黏土、石材或金属将其重现。该复制品除物理外形外，不保留任何有用性质。

  • 将你所触碰的物体、生物或液体表面的土质微粒分离并收集起来，使目标在片刻之间被彻底清洁或净化。

塑形只能影响你能够以物理方式接触到的生物或物体。你也可以尝试与上述类似的其他用途，其效果由游戏主持人裁定。

Your command of the Rune of Earth allows you to manipulate raw forces of rock, mineral, and soil in basic ways, producing one of the following effects:

  • Quickly shape up to one cubic foot of available material into a simple geometric form like a cuboid, ellipsoid, or polyhedron.

  • Precisely copy the physical shape of a held object that is smaller than a 6-inch cube, reproducing it from available clay, stone, or metal. The replica retains no useful properties except for its physical form.

  • Separate and collect earthen particles from the surface of an object, creature, or liquid that you touch, rendering the subject completely cleaned or purified in moments.

Mould may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Rune: Life.name: 符文：生命 Rune: Life
Rune: Life.description:
一种混沌的创造之力，负责活体物质。生命符文支配生命值以及与生物生长相关的事务。

生命符文以感知进行成长，并提供恢复生命值，或造成由坚韧对抗的毒素伤害。它与秩序的死亡符文相对立。

A chaotic force of creation, responsible for living matter. The Life rune governs health and matters relating to biological growth.

The Life rune scales using Wisdom and provides Restoration of Health or inflicts Poison damage opposed by Fortitude. It is opposed by the orderly rune of Death.

bloom.name: 绽放 Bloom
bloom.description:
你对生命符文的命令使你能够刺激生物材料生长并滋养身体生命值，产生以下效果之一：

  • 培育 1 立方英尺的现有植物或真菌，使其快速生长到健康、开花或可收获的状态。

  • 鉴定术一种正在影响生物的负面身体状况，例如 @Condition[diseased]、@Condition[poisoned]、@Condition[bleeding] 或 @Condition[weakened]。

  • 确认一部分食物或饮品是否没有受到细菌、寄生虫或毒物的污染。

绽放只能影响你能够实际触碰到的生物或物体。你也可以尝试其他与上述类似的用途，其效果由游戏主持人决定。

Your command of the Rune of Life allows you to stimulate biological growth and nourish physical health, producing one of the following effects:

  • Cultivate 1 cubic foot of existing plants or fungus to rapidly grow to a healthy, blossoming, or harvestable state.

  • Identify a negative physical condition that is affecting a creature such as @Condition[diseased], @Condition[poisoned], @Condition[bleeding], or @Condition[weakened].

  • Verify whether a portion of food or drink is free of contamination from bacteria, parasites, or poison.

Bloom may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

ancestry.name: 巨人裔 Giantkin
ancestry.description:
元素之力主宰了你的诞生，赋予你超自然的活力。你高大的体格和强健的身躯常常让他人以为你只是个不假思索的肌肉块，但你的族群最为人所知的，是他们强韧的体魄与深厚的知识。你继承了群山的力量。

Elemental forces presided over your birth, instilling you with supernatural vigor. Your large frame and muscular build often lead others to believe you are an unthinking mass of muscle, but yours is a people known most for their physical resilience and the deep well of their knowledge. You have inherited the strength of mountains.

background.name: 医师 Physician
background.description:
你曾是某种类型的治疗者或医疗专业人士。你一生中有一段时间都在学习医学科学，并且你很擅长察觉他人的病症。你知道如何治疗创伤、疾病，以及如何鉴定术它们的来源。

You were a healer or medical professional of some variety. You have spent a portion of your life learning medical science, and you have a propensity for noticing illness in others. You know how to treat wounds, diseases, and how to identify their sources.

biography.public:
神乐是一位坚毅的治疗者，在狂乱的战斗中增强盟友的生命值与士气。神乐渴望获得治疗者签名天赋。

Kagura is a stalwart healer who bolsters the health and morale of her allies amidst the frenzy of battle. Kagura aspires to obtain the Healer signature Talent.

description.public:
缝制或铆接在皮革或布料衬底上的重叠金属片，鳞甲看起来像巨龙的鳞皮，能很好地防护劈砍和刺击——不过它声音很大，而且不够灵活。

Overlapping metal plates sewn or riveted onto a leather or cloth backing, scale mail resembles the hide of a dragon and protects well against cuts and stabs—though it's noisy and inflexible.

巨斧是一种高大的武器，拥有宽阔且通常为双刃的斧头，专为施展毁灭性的顺劈而打造，能以可怕的力量劈开人类与野兽。

A towering weapon with a broad, often double-bladed head, the greataxe is made for delivering devastating cleaves, hewing men and beasts with terrible force.

Intimidator.name: 威吓者 Intimidator
Intimidator.description:
你专精于运用自己令人畏惧的气势来击溃敌人的士气。
You specialize in exerting your intimidating presence to break the morale of your foes.

intimidate.name: 威吓 Intimidate
intimidate.description:
你对处于你交战范围内的一名敌人进行身体上的威吓，对你的目标发动一次威吓技能攻击。若成功，其士气承受虚空伤害。

You physically intimidate an enemy that is within your engagement range, performing an Intimidation skill attack against your target. On a success they sustain Void damage to Morale.

Uppercut.name: 上勾拳 Uppercut
Uppercut.description:
一种双手持用武器技法，你向上挥动武器，并借助武器回摆再进行一次打击。
A two-handed weapon technique where you swing your weapon upwards, making a second Strike with the backswing of your weapon.

uppercut.name: 上勾拳 Uppercut
uppercut.description:
在一次未严重失误的基础打击攻击之后，你以较低的动作消耗用武器的回摆再次打击同一目标。

Following a basic Strike attack which did not critically miss, you Strike the same target again with the backswing of your weapon at reduced Action cost.

Cleave.name: 顺劈 Cleave
Cleave.description:
这种武技是一种专门的双手持用战斗动作，依靠蛮力将你的武器大幅挥出，沿途击中多个敌人。
This martial technique is a specialized two-handed fighting maneuver which relies upon brute strength to swing your weapon in a wide arc, hitting multiple enemies in its path.

cleave.name: 顺劈 Cleave
cleave.description:
凶猛的双手挥击以120度弧线劈开敌人。

A ferocious two-handed swing cleaves through foes in a 120 degree arc.

Powerful Physique.name: 强健体魄 Powerful Physique
Powerful Physique.description:
你可以使用具有缓慢特性的武器，并穿戴具有笨重特性的护甲，而不会在先攻掷骰中承受祸骰。
You can wield weapons with the Slow trait and wear Armor with the Bulky trait without suffering Banes to your Initiative rolls.

Berserker.name: 狂战士 Berserker
Berserker.description:
你沉醉于战斗的刺激之中，不顾一切地投身于混战。

You revel in the thrill of combat, hurling yourself into the fray with reckless abandon.

berserkerRage.name: 狂战士狂怒 Berserker Rage
berserkerRage.description:
你陷入激怒状态。处于激怒状态时，你的所有近战攻击额外造成4点伤害。你可以在自己的回合中进行一次意志检定，对抗 DC 20；若成功，则可尝试结束该效果。战斗结束时，该效果会自动结束。
You become Enraged. While Enraged you deal 4 additional damage on all melee attacks. You may attempt to end the effect on your own turn by succeeding on a Willpower test against a DC of 20. The effect ends automatically when Combat is concluded.
berserkerRage.condition:
自你在战斗中的上个回合以来，你的生命值池已受到伤害。
You have suffered damage to your Health pool since your last turn in Combat.

Strong Grip.name: 强力握持 Strong Grip
Strong Grip.description:
你对自己武器装备的掌握稳固而不可动摇。你在持用双手持用武器时，仍可执行需要空出一只手的动作。试图缴械你时，施加+2祸骰。
Your grasp of your weaponry is firm and unyielding. You can perform Actions which require a free hand while wielding a two-handed weapon. Attempts to Disarm you are made with +2 Banes.

Blood Frenzy.name: 嗜血狂乱 Blood Frenzy
Blood Frenzy.description:
你的战斗渴望激励你施展更高强度的动作。当你造成一次对生命值造成伤害的暴击时，你立即获得 +1 动作。此增益每轮只能触发一次。

Your battle lust spurs you to feats of heightened action. When you achieve a Critical Hit that deals damage to Health you immediately gain +1 Action. This benefit may only happen once per Round.

Executioner's Strike.name: 刽子手的打击 Executioner's Strike
Executioner's Strike.description:
你对一名受伤的敌人发动一次果断的打击。

You deliver a single decisive strike against a wounded enemy.

executionersStrike.name: 刽子手的打击 Executioner's Strike
executionersStrike.description:
你用一把双手持用重型武器施展一次致命打击。若你的攻击成功，你的对手还会陷入持续 3 轮的流血状态，每轮受到等同于你力量值的额外伤害。

You deliver a Deadly Strike with a two-handed heavy weapon. If your attack is successful, your opponent also suffers the Bleeding condition for 3 Rounds, taking additional damage each Round equal to your Strength score.
executionersStrike.condition:
你的目标处于浴血状态。
Your target is Bloodied.

effects.name: 刽子手的打击 Executioner's Strike

Unshakeable Stance.name: 不动如山姿态 Unshakeable Stance
Unshakeable Stance.description:
你不会被任何不是由敌人掷出的重度成功或由你自己掷出的重度失败的动作非自愿地移动，也不会被其击倒。
You cannot be unvoluntarily Moved or knocked Prone by any action that is not a Critical Success rolled by an enemy or a Critical Failure rolled by yourself.

Ruthless Momentum.name: 无情动量 Ruthless Momentum
Ruthless Momentum.description:
你沉醉于自己在战斗中所能造成的杀戮，并在每个敌人倒下时继续紧逼战局。

You relish the carnage you can cause in combat and continue to press the fray as each enemy falls.

ruthlessMomentum.name: 无情动量 Ruthless Momentum
ruthlessMomentum.description:
击败一个敌人后，你可以移动至多等同于你的跨步距离，并攻击另一个处于近战范围内的敌人。

After defeating an enemy, you may move up to your Stride and attack another foe within melee range.
ruthlessMomentum.condition:
你用一次近战攻击使一名敌人失去行动能力。
You incapacitate an enemy with a melee attack.

Second Wind.name: 二次振作 Second Wind
Second Wind.description:
你的身体强健，使你能够逼迫自己突破常规极限。
Your physical hardiness allows you to push yourself beyond conventional limits.

secondWind.name: 二次振作 Second Wind
secondWind.description:
你集中精力，恢复等同于你坚韧值的生命值。

You focus your energy and recover your Toughness score in Health.

Intercept.name: 拦截 Intercept
Intercept.description:
你保护你的盟友，拦截那些原本可能会落向你同伴的攻击。
You protect your allies, intercepting blows that might otherwise be directed towards your companions.

intercept.name: 拦截 Intercept
intercept.description:
你拦截进入你交战半径内的敌人的路径，立即进行最多等同于你跨步距离的移动，插入其间并阻挡他们的去路。

如果敌人在其回合中移出你的交战半径，或攻击任何其他生物，你可以对其进行一次脱离打击。

You intercept the path of an enemy which enters your Engagement radius, immediatly moving up to your Stride to interpose yourself and block their path.

If the enemy moves out of your Engagement radius or attacks any other creature during their turn, you may make a Disengagement Strike against them.
intercept.condition:
一名敌人移入或穿过你的交战半径。
An enemy moves into or through your Engagement radius.

Unarmed Combat Training.name: 徒手战斗训练 Unarmed Combat Training
Unarmed Combat Training.description:
你熟悉基础武术和徒手战斗。你知道如何运用自身的体魄压制或束缚对手。你对徒手类别的武器拥有受训熟练度。

You are familiar with basic martial arts and hand-to-hand combat. You know how to subdue or restrain opponents using your physical Strength. You are Trained with weapons in the Unarmed category.

grapple.name: 擒抱 Grapple
grapple.description:
你尝试以身体压制或制服一名对手。对一个邻近目标进行一次运动技能攻击。若成功，你和你的目标均陷入 @Condition[restrained] 状态，持续 1 轮。

You attempt to physically restrain or subdue an opponent. Perform a Athletics skill attack against an adjacent target. If successful, both you and your target are @Condition[restrained] for 1 Round.

Sundering Strike.name: 粉碎打击 Sundering Strike
Sundering Strike.description:
你掌握了一种武技，能够利用敌人防御中最薄弱的环节，使其暴露于进一步的伤害之下。

You know a martial technique to exploit the weakest points of an enemy's defenses, exposing them to further harm.

sunderingStrike.name: 粉碎打击 Sundering Strike
sunderingStrike.description:
你用你的主手武器进行一次打击；若成功，则会对目标施加持续 3 轮的暴露状态。此次攻击难以施展，且造成的伤害会减少。

You make a Strike with your mainhand weapon which, if successful, applies the Exposed condition to your target for 3 rounds. This attack is Difficult to perform and deals reduced damage.

Heavy Weapon Training.name: 重型武器训练 Heavy Weapon Training
Heavy Weapon Training.description:
你知道如何使用重型武器造成沉重打击，在每一次挥击中都倾注你的全部力量。你对重型和平衡类别中的所有武器都处于受训等级。

You know how to use a heavy weapon to deliver punishing blows, putting your entire strength behind every swing. You are Trained with all weapons in the Heavy and Balanced categories.

heavyStrike.name: 强力打击 Heavy Strike
heavyStrike.description:
你用主手武器发动一次强力的打击。这次攻击施展得较慢，但经过强化，能造成额外伤害。

You unleash a powerful Strike with your mainhand weapon. The attack is slower to execute, but is Empowered to deliver additional damage.

Heavy Weapon Proficiency.name: 重型武器熟练度 Heavy Weapon Proficiency
Heavy Weapon Proficiency.description:
你在军用武器装备的使用方面接受过熟练教育。你获得熟练工训练等级，并在简易、重型和平衡类别的武器上获得+1技能加值。

You have a fluent education in the use of martial weaponry. You gain the Journeyman training rank and a +1 Skill Bonus with weapons in the Simple, Heavy, and Balanced categories.

Thick Skin.name: 厚皮肤 Thick Skin
Thick Skin.description:
你的身体强健，使你更能抵御伤害。你获得对钝击、挥砍和穿刺伤害的 +2 抗性。
Your physical toughness makes you more resistant to harm. You gain +2 Resistance to Bludgeoning, Slashing, and Piercing damage.

Armored Efficiency.name: 装甲效率 Armored Efficiency
Armored Efficiency.description:
你受过训练，能够穿着最重型的护甲，同时仍保持机动性。穿着重型护甲时，你每回合可以使用一次免费的移动动作。

You are trained in wearing the heaviest types of armor while still retaining mobility. You are able to use a free Movement action once per Turn while wearing Heavy armor.

Penetrating Throw.name: 穿透投掷 Penetrating Throw
Penetrating Throw.description:
你可以以如此凶猛的力道掷出你的武器，使其沿直线击中所有目标。

You can hurl your weapon with such ferocity that it strikes all targets in a direct line.

penetratingThrow.name: 穿透投掷 Penetrating Throw
penetratingThrow.description:
你进行一次投掷武器打击，穿透并命中直线上的所有敌人。

You perform a Throw weapon strike which penetrates to hit all enemies in a straight line.

description.public:
细长、渐尖且专为穿刺而造，细剑是杀手的武器——旨在滑入肋骨之间或护甲的缝隙中，几乎不留痕迹。

Thin, tapered, and made for piercing, the stiletto is a killer’s weapon — designed to slide between ribs or gaps in armor and leave barely a trace.

Adrenaline Surge.name: 肾上腺素涌动 Adrenaline Surge
Adrenaline Surge.description:
你可以调动非凡的体能储备，以应对施加于你身体上的挑战。

You can draw upon exceptional reserves of physical strength to meet challenges imposed on your body.

adrenalineSurge.name: 肾上腺素涌动 Adrenaline Surge
adrenalineSurge.description:
你消耗英雄气概，并在 3 轮内对任何使用力量进行成长的动作获得+2 恩惠。你可以在战斗中于自己的回合之外、进行反应前执行此动作。

You expend Heroism and benefit from +2 Boons to any action which scales using Strength for 3 Rounds. You may perform this action outside of your turn in Combat before making a Reaction.

effects.name: 肾上腺素涌动 Adrenaline Surge

ancestry.name: 人类 Human
ancestry.description:
你生于无数不同的状态与遥远分散的地方之间，是一名始终适应力极强的人类。无论高矮、纤瘦、健壮还是圆胖，你的外貌若说有什么特点，那就是多种多样。人类最为人所知的是在基因上更倾向于坚定决心，并拥有促使顽强求生意志的传统。

Found amid countless conditions and far-flung places, you were born an ever-adaptable human. Tall or short, thin, muscular, or rotund, your physical appearance is nothing if not varied. Humans are most known for a genetic predisposition toward determination, with traditions that drive a stubborn will to survive.

background.name: 警员 Constable
background.description:
你曾是某个执法组织的一员。你学会了如何对周围环境保持警觉，在复杂的社交结构中行事，并展现出令人畏惧的气势。

You were part of a law enforcement organization. You learned how to remain vigilant to your surroundings, work within complex social structures, and affect an imposing presence.

biography.public:
乌尔芬是一名凶猛的战士，使用双手持用巨斧作战，偏好能造成大量伤害或打击多个目标的重型劈砍。乌尔芬渴望获得狂战士签名天赋。

Ulfen is a fierce warrior who fights with a two-handed greataxe, favoring heavy blows that do significant damage or hit multiple targets. Ulfen aspires to obtain the Berserker signature talent.

description.public:
这根法师法杖是一件护符，可辅助施法，或向敌人喷射奥术火焰。

This mage staff is a talisman to assist with spellcraft or hurl gouts of arcane flame at enemies.

环甲是在带衬垫的底层上缝制金属环制成的，相较于更重型的链甲，它提供的保护较少，但作为交换能带来更高的机动性。

Ring mail features metal rings sewn onto a padded base, offering a compromise of less protection than heavier mail options in exchange for greater mobility.

Inspire Heroism.name: 激励英勇 Inspire Heroism
Inspire Heroism.description:
你英勇的存在激励着附近的盟友，让他们能够自信地发起攻击。
Your courageous presence inspires your nearby allies to strike with confidence.

inspireHeroism.name: 激励英勇 Inspire Heroism
inspireHeroism.description:
每个盟友（不包括你自己）在10 Feet内，进行的动作直到其下个回合结束前获得+1恩惠。

Each ally, excluding yourself, within 10 Feet gains +1 Boon to actions performed until the end of their next Turn.

Gesture: Influence.name: 手势：影响 Gesture: Influence
Gesture: Influence.description:
你将符文中的奥术力量强化为一种集中的直接接触，这通常是基础触碰手势的更强力进阶形式。

影响手势使用Presence进行加成，并以一个相邻的单一生物为目标。它会对未能抵抗该法术的目标造成10 基础伤害。该手势需要1 只手来施放，基础消耗为3 动作和1 专注。

You intensify the arcane power of a Rune into a concentrated direct contact which is generally a more powerful evolution of the basic Touch gesture.

The Influence gesture scales using Presence and targets a single adjacent creature. It deals 10 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 3 Action and 1 Focus.

Light Weapon Training.name: 轻型武器训练 Light Weapon Training
Light Weapon Training.description:
你知道如何以高度的机动性与优雅在战斗中流畅地挥舞轻型武器。你对轻型和平衡类别中的所有武器均为受训。

You know how to wield light weapons fluidly with a high degree of maneuverability and grace in combat. You are Trained with all weapons in the Light and Balanced categories.

lunge.name: 突刺 Lunge
lunge.description:
你敏捷地向前突进，以突然而出乎意料的迅捷发动一次攻击，使用一把具有灵巧特性的武器对单一目标进行一次打击，其攻击距离增加+2 feet。

此次攻击为困难，但你不会离开当前位置，且此次攻击不会引发脱离接战。

You dart forward nimbly, making a strike with sudden and unexpected swiftness to perform a Strike with a Finesse weapon against a single target with an increased range of +2 feet.

The attack is Difficult, but you do not move from your current position nor does this attack provoke Disengagement.

Rune: Oblivion.name: 符文：湮灭 Rune: Oblivion
Rune: Oblivion.description:
一种混乱的、毁灭并湮灭存在的力量。湮灭符文掌管物质的消解或精神的溃散。

湮灭符文以Intellect进行成长，目标为意志，并对士气造成Void伤害。它与有序的灵魂符文相对立。

A chaotic force of destruction and annihilation of existence. The Oblivion rune governs unmaking of matter or decoherence of spirit.

The Oblivion rune scales using Intellect, targets Willpower, and deals Void damage to Morale. It is opposed by the orderly rune of Soul.

erase.name: 擦除 Erase
erase.description:
你对湮灭符文的命令使你能够在存在的结构中拆解出微小的孔洞，产生以下效果之一：

  • 将你手持的一件小于 6 英寸立方体的非魔法物体解离，粉碎为其构成元素所形成的细微尘埃。

  • 麻痹你自己或你所触碰的一名自愿目标感受情绪的能力，使其进入平静、坚忍或淡漠的状态。只要你不再进行进一步的动作，此效果便可持续维持。

  • 压制一个光源的强度，使其可见半径减少一半；只要你与其保持物理接触，该效果便会持续。任意时刻只能以这种方式削弱一个光源。

擦除只能影响你能够实际触碰到的生物或物体。你也可以尝试其他与上述类似的用途，其效果由游戏主持人裁定。

Your command of the Rune of Oblivion allows you to unravel tiny holes in the fabric of existence, producing one of the following effects:

  • Disintegrate a non-magical object you hold smaller than a 6-inch cube, sundering it to a fine particulate dust of its component elements.

  • Anesthetize the ability to feel emotion from yourself or a willing target that you touch, causing it to enter a placid, stoic, or dispassionate state. This effect can be maintained as long as you make no further Action.

  • Subdue the potency of a light source, causing its visible radius to be reduced by half for as long as you maintain physical contact with it. Only one light source may be dampened in this way at a given time.

Erase may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Rune: Flame.name: 符文：火焰 Rune: Flame
Rune: Flame.description:
元素热能的混沌力量。火焰符文支配火与热。

火焰符文以智力进行成长，目标为反射，造成火元素伤害于生命值。它与秩序井然的霜冻符文相对立。

The chaotic force of elemental, thermal energy. The Flame rune governs fire and heat.

The Flame rune scales using Intellect, targets Reflex, and deals Fire damage to Health. It is opposed by the orderly rune of Frost.

enkindle.name: 引燃 Enkindle
enkindle.description:
你对火焰符文的掌握使你能够以富有创造性的方式操纵火焰与热能，产生以下效果之一：

  • 显现出一个一英寸球体大小的元素火焰爆发，可以点燃蜡烛、火把或其他可燃材料。

  • 为你的身体赋予瞬间的热能护盾，使你在紧接着的一个消耗1 动作或更少的动作中，对火焰伤害获得免疫。

  • 控制一小片区域内火焰的移动，使其闪烁、舞动或变换，呈现出一场光与影的动态表演。

引燃只能影响你能够以身体接触到的生物或物体。你也可以尝试其他与上述类似的用途，其效果由游戏主持人决定。

Your command of the Rune of Flame allows you to manipulate fire and thermal energy in creative ways, producing one of the following effects:

  • Manifest a burst of elemental flame in one inch sphere which can ignite a candle, torch, or other flammable materials.

  • Imbue your body with momentary thermal shielding which provides you with immunity to fire damage on an immediately subsequent action that costs 1 Action or less.

  • Control the movement of flames within a small area, causing them to flicker, dance, or shift in an animated performance of light and shadow.

Enkindle may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Gesture: Arrow.name: 手势：箭头 Gesture: Arrow
Gesture: Arrow.description:
你向远处的目标掷出一枚注入了符文魔法力量的投射物。

箭矢手势基于智力进行成长，并以60英尺内的单个生物为目标，对未能抵抗该法术的目标造成8 基础伤害。此手势需要1 只手来施放，基础消耗为3 动作和1 专注。

You hurl a projectile imbued with the magical power of a Rune at a distant target.

The Arrow gesture scales using Intellect and targets a single creature up to a distance of 60 feet, dealing 8 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 3 Action and 1 Focus.

War Mage.name: 战斗法师 War Mage
War Mage.description:
你的施法已被磨炼成战争武器，用以挫败其他法师的咒语。即使你无法辨认正在施放的法术，你也可以询问游戏主持人自己是否知晓能够反制敌方法术的符文。你在任何反制法术尝试上获得+2恩惠。

Your spellcraft is honed as a weapon of war to thwart the incantations of other magi. You may ask the Gamemaster if you know a Rune capable of countering an enemy spell, even if you do not recognize the spell being cast. You gain +2 Boons to any Counterspell attempt.

Impetus.name: 动因 Impetus
Impetus.description:
你很擅长利用他人思考缓慢这一点。若你在战斗的一个回合中位于先攻顺序的第一位，则你获得 +1 当前和最大动作。

You are gifted at exploiting the slowness with which others think. If you are first in Initiative order during a round of Combat, you gain +1 current and maximum Action.

Opportunistic Spellcraft.name: 借机施法 Opportunistic Spellcraft
Opportunistic Spellcraft.description:
你的敏捷思维能编织魔法，利用稍纵即逝的机会之窗。你可以使用Touch手势来进行一次脱离攻击，而非进行一次近战武器攻击。

Your quick thinking can weave magic to exploit brief windows of opportunity. You may make a Disengagement Attack using the Touch Gesture instead of a melee weapon attack.

Pyromancer.name: 炎术师 Pyromancer
Pyromancer.description:
你极其擅长编织火焰符文。使用此符文的法术在造成暴击时会施加 @Condition[burning]。

燃烧效果持续 1 Round，并造成等同于你的智力数值的火元素伤害，同时影响生命值和士气。

You are highly skilled in weaving the Rune of Flame. Spells which use this Rune cause @Condition[burning] on Critical Hits.

The Burning effect lasts for 1 Round and deals your Intellect score as Fire damage to both Health and Morale.

Gesture: Pulse.name: 手势：脉冲 Gesture: Pulse
Gesture: Pulse.description:
将一个符文的奥术力量驱逐出来，以你为中心向外扩散成一个半径范围。

脉冲手势基于Presence进行成长，并产生一个10英尺半径的散发区域，对未能抵抗该法术的目标造成8基础伤害。该手势需要2只手来施放，基础消耗为5动作和2专注。

试玩测试说明

该天赋目前放置在一个第4阶节点。它最终将只能在更高等级时获得（可能需要6级）。目前为了测试而“提前”开放。

Expel the arcane power of a Rune in a radius that travels outward with you at its center.

The Pulse gesture scales using Presence and produces an emanation with 10 foot radius, dealing 8 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. The gesture requires 2 Hands to cast and has a base cost of 5 Action and 2 Focus.

Playtest Notes

This talent is currently placed at a Tier 4 node. It will eventually only be attainable at a higher level (probably Level 6 required). It is currently available "early" for testing.

Arcana Novice.name: 奥术新手 Arcana Novice
Arcana Novice.description:
你所受的教育涵盖了形而上学与魔法理论的基础、符文之间的关系、秩序与混沌的对立本质，以及对灵体存在的粗略引言，其中包括最广为人知的被神化与被妖魔化的崇拜对象。你获得奥术技能的新手等级，并且在该技能上不再被视为未受训。

你对魔法基本语法原理的初步理解，足以让你鉴别一个法术或仪式可能使用了哪一种次级符文，以及所使用的手势（若非屈折的话）。你能够分辨一个存在更受混沌还是秩序影响，也能辨识常见灵体（无论低等还是高等）的迹象。你对宗教习俗了解得足够多，因此在与崇拜某位灵体或神祇的人交流时，不至于让自己出丑。

Your education covered the fundamentals of metaphysics and magical theory, the relationship between the runes, the opposing nature of order and chaos, and a cursory introduction to spiritual beings including the most commonly known deified and demonized figures of worship. You gain the Novice rank in the Arcana skill and are no longer considered Untrained in that skill.

Your rudimentary understanding of the principle grammar of magic is sufficient to identify which lesser rune a spell or ritual may be using, as well as the gesture used (if not the inflection). You can identify whether a figure is influenced more by chaos or by order, and can spot the signs of common spirits (both lesser and greater). You know enough about religious customs to communicate with those who worship a particular spirit or deity without embarrassing yourself.

Strategic Repositioning.name: 战略性重新部署 Strategic Repositioning
Strategic Repositioning.description:
你总会提前思考，一旦危险逼近时自己该站在什么位置。在战斗遭遇的第1回合开始前，只要你并非未察觉，你就可以立刻向任意允许的方向移动4英尺。

如果有多个战斗者拥有此特性，则重新定位按先攻的逆序进行。

You are always thinking ahead about where to position yourself should danger loom. Before Turn 1 of a Combat encounter, provided that you are not Unaware, you may immediately move 4 feet in any permitted direction.

If multiple combatants have this feature, repositioning occurs in reverse order of Initiative.

Lightbringer.name: 光明使者 Lightbringer
Lightbringer.description:
你极其擅长编织照明符文。使用该符文的法术在造成暴击时会施加 @Condition[irradiated] 状态。

辐照效果持续1 轮，并会造成等同于你灵识数值的光耀伤害，同时作用于生命值和士气。

You are highly skilled in weaving the Rune of Illumination. Spells which use this Rune cause the @Condition[irradiated] condition on Critical Hits.

The Irradiated effect lasts for 1 Round and deals your Presence score as Radiant damage to both Health and Morale.

Awareness Novice.name: 察觉新手 Awareness Novice
Awareness Novice.description:
你已经接受过情境察觉基础训练，能够注意到周围环境中的重要细节。你在察觉 技能上获得新手等级，并且在该技能上不再被视为未受训。

你知道进入一个房间时要检查出口，也知道如何寻找隐藏的武器、隐蔽的陷阱以及其他威胁。你知道如何发现自己何时被跟踪，以及如何搜查常见的藏身之处。

You have been trained in the basics of situational awareness, and are able to notice important details about your environment. You gain the Novice rank in the Awareness skill and are no longer considered Untrained in that skill.

You know to check for exits when you enter a room, and how to look for concealed weapons, hidden traps, and other threats. You know how to spot when you are being followed, and how to search for common hiding places.

Versatile Translator.name: 多才多艺的翻译者 Versatile Translator
Versatile Translator.description:
你拥有语言学方面的学术背景，或对语言有一种与生俱来的敏锐直觉。你的能力使你能够解读用多种语言写成文本的基本含义。

你可以将一种你不懂、但使用通用字形或字符书写的语言文本，翻译成一种你所懂的语言。进行这样的翻译时，你需要每个词花费一分钟，将文本转写成一种你能够理解的语言。

你的译文较为粗略，且往往缺乏细微之处，但它们确实包含了文本的所有要点。

You have a scholarly background in linguistics or an intuitive knack for languages. Your capabilities enable you to decipher the basic meaning of text written in a variety of languages.

You can translate text of a language you do not know that is written using a common set of glyphs or characters to a language that you do know. Creating such a translation requires spending one minute per word to transcribe the text into a language which you understand.

Your translations are rudimentary and often lack nuance, but they do contain all essential points of the text.

Iramancer.name: 艾拉曼瑟 Iramancer
Iramancer.description:
你的奥术能力由愤怒驱动。处于激怒状态时，你仍然可以消耗专注，且你的所有法术攻击额外造成 2 点伤害。
Your feats of arcana are fueled by anger. While Enraged you may still spend Focus and you deal 2 additional damage to all spell attacks.

Counterspell.name: 反制法术 Counterspell
Counterspell.description:
你会立刻对正在施放的法术作出反应，并构成一道符文与一个手势，以瓦解并抵消敌方法师的施法。

试玩测试说明

这个动作现在可以在试玩测试中使用，但尚未完全自动化。你可以执行反制法术，但需要由游戏主持人手动撤销先前已应用的法术，并手动扣除其动作和专注消耗。反制法术整体流程中的这些步骤将在后续更新中实现自动化，因此一旦反制法术被确认，也会同时确认被反制的法术，但其效果会被移除。

You immediately react to a spell being cast and compose a rune and gesture designed to unravel and negate the spellcraft of an enemy mage.

Playtest Notes

This action can now be used in playtesting, but it is not yet fully automated. The Counterspell can be performed, but it is up to the Gamemaster to manually reverse a previously applied spell and to manually deduct its Action and Focus cost. These steps of the overall Counterspell workflow will be automated in a subsequent update such that a confirmed Counterspell will also confirm the spell that was countered, but with its effects removed.

counterspell.name: 反制法术 Counterspell
counterspell.description:
你将奥术能量塑形成一道对抗性的施法，目标是你在30尺内看见的一名施法者。

指定一个你已知的符文和手势，以尝试反制该法术。若你选择的符文与该法术所用的某个符文相对立，你的此次尝试获得+2 恩惠。若你选择的手势与正在施放的手势完全相同，你的此次尝试也获得+2 恩惠。

对目标的意志防御进行一次无害的法术攻击。若你的掷骰结果超过其防御，则该法术被反制，其魔法被消除，不产生任何效果。

You form arcane energy into a countervailing spellcraft, targeting a spellcaster you can see within 30 feet.

Designate a Rune and Gesture which you know to attempt to counter the spell. Choosing a Rune which is opposed to one used in the spell grants +2 Boons to your attempt. Selecting the identical Gesture as the one being cast also adds +2 Boons to your attempt.

Perform a harmless Spell Attack against your target's Willpower defense. If your roll exceeds their defense, the spell is countered and its magic is nullified, producing no effects.
counterspell.condition:
另一个你能看见的生物正在施放一个法术。
Another creature which you can see is casting a spell.

Flame Proficiency.name: 火焰熟练度 Flame Proficiency
Flame Proficiency.description:
你已熟练掌握运用火焰符文进行施法。使用此符文施放的法术获得+1技能加值。

试玩测试说明

此天赋最终还将为引燃动作提供升级，扩展其效果或加入新的使用选项。

You have fluency in weaving spellcraft using the Rune of Flame. You gain a +1 Skill Bonus for spells cast using this Rune.

Playtest Notes

This talent will eventually also provide an upgrade to the Enkindle action, expanding its effectiveness or including new options for how to use it.

Rune: Kinesis.name: 符文：念动力 Rune: Kinesis
Rune: Kinesis.description:
空间与物理移动的混沌之力。念动力符文掌管一切与移动行为和物理性相关的事物。

念动力符文依据Presence进行成长，针对Physical防御，并造成Bludgeoning、Piercing或Slashing伤害到生命值。它与秩序的Control符文相对。

The chaotic force of space and physical movement. The Kinesis rune governs all things related to the act of movement and physicality.

The Kinesis rune scales using Presence, targets Physical defense, and deals Bludgeoning, Piercing, or Slashing damage to Health. It is opposed by the orderly rune of Control.

propel.name: 推进 Propel
propel.description:
你对念动力符文的掌控使你能够对重力施加局部控制，以执行基础的念动力操控，产生以下效果之一：

  • 将15尺内一个未固定且重量不超过1的物体拉向你并接住它。由生物已装备或持有的物体绝不视为未固定，除非该生物愿意放手。

  • 将一个你持有且重量不超过1的物体弹向最远30尺外的一个目标。该物体会以适中的速度笔直且准确无误地飞向该目标。物体飞行路径上的任何生物都可以作出反应接住它，只要他们有一只空手可这么做。

  • 使一个你所触碰、重量小于或等于你Presence10倍的物体或自愿生物悬浮在半空中，并将其位置从原本所在地向任意方向改变最多20尺。只要你不再进行进一步的动作且未处于@Condition[incapacitated]状态，你就可以无限期维持这种悬浮。

除非另有说明，Propel 只能影响你能够实际触碰到的生物或物体。你也可以尝试其他与上述类似的用途，其效果由游戏主持人裁定。

Your command of the Rune of Kinesis allows you to exert local control over gravitational forces to perform basic telekinetic manipulations, producing one of the following effects:

  • Pull an unsecured object within 15 feet and with weight no greater than 1 towards you and catch it. An object that is equipped or possessed by a creature is never treated as unsecured unless that creature is willing to release it.

  • Flick an object that you hold with weight no greater than 1 towards a target up to 30 feet away. The object flies unerringly in a straight line towards that target at a moderate speed. Any creature along the object's path can react to catch it as long as they have a free hand with which to do so.

  • Suspend in midair an object or willing creature that you touch with weight less than or equal to 10 times your Presence, altering its position up to 20 feet in any direction from its original location. You can maintain this suspension indefinitely as long as you take no further Action and are not @Condition[incapacitated].

Propel may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch unless otherwise specified. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Gesture: Blast.name: 手势：爆破 Gesture: Blast
Gesture: Blast.description:
你将一个符文中的奥术力量掷向你能看见的附近一点，在那里引发一场强烈的能量爆炸。

爆破手势会随智力成长，并以施法者60英尺内的一点为中心，产生一个半径6英尺的爆炸。该爆炸会对未能抵抗该法术的目标造成8基础伤害。此手势需要2只手来施放，基础消耗为5动作和2专注。

试玩测试说明

该天赋目前位于一个第4阶节点。它最终将只能在更高等级时获得（可能需要6级）。目前为了测试而“提前”开放。

You hurl the arcane power of a Rune into an intense explosion of energy at a nearby point you can see.

The Blast gesture scales with Intellect and produces a blast with 6 feet radius centered on a point within 60 feet of the spellcaster. The blast deals 8 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture requires 2 Hands to cast and has a base cost of 5 Action and 2 Focus.

Playtest Notes

This talent is currently placed at a Tier 4 node. It will eventually only be attainable at a higher level (probably Level 6 required). It is currently available "early" for testing.

ancestry.name: 魔裔 Devilkin
ancestry.description:
你生来便对自己的创造物拥有出人意料的魔法影响力。你的外表显露出种种明显特征，迷信之人会将这些特征与位面生物联系起来——绯红色的皮肤、无用的翅膀或犄角、爬行动物般的眼睛。你对光的厌恶以及对火元素的超自然抗性，也几乎无助于打消人们认为你是真正恶魔的念头。

You were born with unexpected magical influence over your creation. Your physical appearance shows tell-tale signs that the superstitious associate with planar beings- crimson flesh, ineffective wings or horns, reptilian eyes. Your dislike of light and preternatural resistance to fire does little to dissuade people from thinking you are an actual devil.

background.name: 表演者 Performer
background.description:
你曾是一名巡回艺人。你学会了自在地出席各种社交场合，懂得如何迎合观众，通过润饰表演细节来引发特定的情绪反应。
You were a travelling entertainer. You learned to be comfortable attending a variety of social functions, how to play to your audience, embellishing details of your performance to evoke particular emotional responses.

biography.public:
扎拉贾是一位充满活力的魔裔，尤其擅长火焰魔法，能够编织危险与防护性的法术来控制战场。扎拉贾立志获得战斗法师签名天赋。

Zarajah is a spirited Devilkin with a penchant for pyromancy who weaves dangerous and warding spells to control the battlefield. Zarajah aspires to obtain the War Mage signature Talent.
